このゲームは面白いです。サッカーをベースに読み合いの面白さが詰まったゲームだと思います。
ただ、現状ではゲーム内のチュートリアルや練習機能が不足していると感じます。
手探りなのも面白いとは思いますが、明らかな初心者とルールがわかってきたプレイヤーでは差が大きく、一部のプレイヤーは少し触って離脱してしまうのではないかと思います。
また、クイックマッチではゲーム放棄のペナルティが存在せず機嫌が悪くなったプレイヤーが故意にオウンゴールをしてゲームを終わらせるというった事がそれなりの頻度で見られます。
これもプレイヤーとしては面白くないので対策が欲しいところです。
プレイヤーカスタマイズ機能が豊富なのは良いです。

Mas é nítido que foi lançado inacabado, com problemas de servidores e crashs que estão sendo resolvidos agora com atualizações diárias.
A interface do jogo é simples demais, faltam muitas coisas basicas de jogos multiplayer e pelo preço que estão cobrando nele não deveria ter sido lançado assim.
Esse jogo tem um potencial enorme, mesmo com esses problemas continuo jogando e me divertindo muito.

Nach 600 Spielstunden kann ich sagen, dass dieses Spiel nur noch eine Pure Qual ist , Movement verkrüppelt Prio-Gaming gemacht von Franzosen und die Teammates die noch übrig geblieben sind, sind komplett hängen gebliebene Leute. Die beta war mit Abstand das best am Spiel danach wurde es Patch für Patch immer schlimmer. Die Geilsten game mechanics wurden entfernt und nun haben wir ein komplett hässliches abklatsch Game von Fifa. Wenn ihr also ein game wollt wo ihr den Supersprint nicht in jede richtung nutzen könnt, dribbling sich nun nur noch  auf 3-4 mechanics basiert und ein nicht immer funktionierenden voicechat wie auch Bugs, die dafür sorgen, dass wenn ein Gegner hinter euch steht, euch ohne Ball Abnahme den ball abnehmen kann indem sie einfach nur in euch reinlaufen dann ist rematch super für euch . Ansonsten verschwendet eure zeit nicht wie ich und kauft euch lieber für 25 euro weed... dieser rotze hier ist absolute abzocke

This is the new Rocket League for me. I've always loved playing as one player on the field since Kick Off 2 days, and this game seems the most fun so far. It's very fast faced, and pushes you to improve your game with every match.

Lot of options on the field, great skill moves, and every match seems different.

There can be a bit of wait time to join a game, but you can spend it practicing.

I wish they would put me in Practice mode from the start while waiting for a game, and not kick me out after I finish a small practice.

TIP: I was frustrated with long wait time, until I changed from Auto Server to specific, Europe. And I started getting into matches too quickly. Apparently MENA servers are quiet big time of the day.

Rematch has a lot going for it, the gameplay is fast-paced and fun. However, if you're playing with a keyboard and mouse, it quickly becomes frustrating.

The controls just aren't intuitive, especially when it comes to passing. It feels clunky and inconsistent. This might not be a problem with a controller, but as a KBM player, it’s a dealbreaker right now.

I'd love to change this to a positive review if mouse and keyboard support improves, but as it stands, I can't recommend it for those not using a controller.

Jugué la beta con mis amigos, fue una época increíble, tenia demasiados bugs y servidores malos, pero prometieron que antes de noviembre se solucionaría todo y entrarían más servidores y aunque la mayoría de bugs fue solucionado, seguimos jugando en el único server de todo latam, donde la mejor partida que tendrás es de 90ms - 150ms, con una constante desventaja contra los que abusan de exploits por usar joystick o por simplemente haber nacido en Brasil, parece que les preocupa más meter una cuarta variante de Ronaldinho que agregar un servidor, y antes de sentir lastima por la pobre la empresa indie que solo vendio casi 2M solo en steam(contando solo este juego), recuerden que eso de los server era una promesa, no una suposición de la comunidad. 
No merece la pena comprarlo a menos que solo lo juegues casualmente o seas Brasilero, arreglen el juego.

Bah y'a pas grand chose à dire...
Ah si, les joueurs sont exécrables sur ce jeu, couplé avec une maniabilité à chier, c'est parti pour des heures de non-fun !
Entre les lags, les desyncs sur certaines parties, un bug assez mystérieux ou parfois dans une partie votre personnage ne peut pas prendre la balle (???)
Les joueurs ne pensent qu'à courir tout droit, aucune passes ne sont tentées, juste ça court, et ça veut marquer pour agrandir le e-phallus.
Pour couronner le tout une méta à base de tir sur backboard pour reprise de volée, laissant le gardien complètement dans les choux et assurant un but 90% du temps.
Le jeu est simplement trop rigide, que ce sois clavier/souris (pour les passes, un enfer) ou à la manette (gestion du viseur complètement médiocre)
Ils ont voulu donner du réalisme en "poussant" la balle si tu sprint dessus, mais au vu de la rigidité tu te retrouves 1 fois sur 2 à taper dessus et à la perdre, c'est d'ailleurs le seul truc qui m'a fait rire sur ce jeu, voir les gens s'auto dribbler car la gestion de la balle est catastrophique.

En bref, vous avez minimum 2 potes avec qui jouer, ça passe en 3V3, si vous avez un plus gros comité, y'a moyen que vous vous amusiez entre vous sur 4V4 et 5V5 (d'ailleurs c'est le seul mode ranked 5V5 alors que c'est littéralement le moins intéréssant) 
Sinon passez votre route, ce jeu n'est pas fait pour être jouer seul, ça va juste tilter votre âme de jouer avec autant de cotoreps.
Jeu voué à mourir avant la fin de l'été (car les devs ont littéralement dit "N'attendez rien de nous on est une petite équipe, les majs ça viendra pas avant fin d'année) 
Heureusement que j'ai pas investi 25 balles dans cette immondice !

Look there are clearly problem with the game. That's why it's a season 0, but £20 for a game that's unfinished feels is a quite a reach.

That being said, the game is refreshing for someone who loves football game. It's clearly not been done to this level. The depth of the tech and mechanics within the game makes it have high replay value. The bugs are likely to do with the netcode rather than the game interaction.

Getting a bunch of friends to play this game was a blast, alongside the ranked experience is again great as long as you don't run into randoms.

Como jugador de juegos de fútbol he de decir que es un soplo de aire fresco. Partidas de corta duración y divertidas. Gráficamente es sencillo pero destaca mucho por su apartado artístico. Me parece un juego con una base muy buena para crecer y convertirse en un magnífico producto. De igual manera, en el momento que hago esta valoración, el juego necesita mejoras importantes en netcode y retoques en la jugabilidad. A continuación voy a enumerar los cambios que, desde mi punto de vista, serían muy interesantes:

- Restar protagonismo a las entradas a ras de suelo. Creo que el sistema defensivo debería ser satisfactorio pero requerir de una mecánica más compleja. Actualmente, robar un balón, no sé si por problemas de netcode o por la hitbox de la acción, puede volverse demasiado "fácil". Muchas veces incluso la distancia a la que se roba un balón me resulta exagerada. Al no haber faltas, no existe una penalización por realizar entradas aleatorias, más allá del gasto de energía.

- El cuerpo a cuerpo no existe. Me gustaría alguna mecánica que te permita, más que sortear una entrada, poder cubrir un balón con sus correspondiente riesgo. Algo bien balanceado puede darle un toque ciertas situaciones.

- Personalmente eliminaría el poder usar la pared de la portería contraria para hacer rebotar el balón y crear una situación de gol. Es algo que puede convertir el ataque en algo repetitivo. Una posible solución podría ser permitir usar sólo mitad de pared para el atacante y la pared completa para los defensores. En caso de que un atacante falle un tiro, el equipo defensor tendrá un saque de puerta. Pero si un balón es despejado, o viene de un rechace de un defensa, sí puede rebotar en la pared. Así se evitarían los corners.

- Variedad de animaciones de los porteros y atajadas. Creo que estaría bien que atajar un balón como portero tuviese algún requisito de skill. En caso de no hacerlo bien, el portero realizaría una animación de rechace. Se premiaría la habilidad y el timing del jugador a la hora de parar. Además, creo que sería interesante añadir muchos más ángulos y animaciones distintas de paradas para otorgarle posibilidades de parada en distintas trayectorias y así hacerlo más preciso.

- Por último, doy por sentado que lo permitirán pero es urgente la posiblidad de cambiar los botones de acciones a tu gusto, tanto con mando como con teclado y ratón.
非常好

Rematch ist eine grafisch gut umgesetzte Idee, und so gern ich es positiv bewerten wollen würde, lässt es das Spiel einfach nicht zu.

Die Bewegungen, Schüsse und vieles weitere fühlt sich sehr holzig und klump an, es hakelt und ruckelt, es fehlt einfach an flüssigen Animationen, so mein Eindruck. Dabei liegt die Zahl der Frames weit über 60. 

Die "Hitbox / Triggerbox" des Torwarts ist ein wenig zu groß. So sind Bälle, welche augenscheinlich schon einem Meter an dem Körper des Keepers vorbei ziehen, trotzdem in jene Hände verschoben worden. Das macht so manchen gut platzierten Torschuss ins Eck sehr unfair. 

Bei den Spielern ist es genau umgekehrt. Es gibt nicht mal eine direkte Taste für die Ballannahme. Entweder, du befindest dich im Triggerbereich des Balls und die Spielfigur nimmt sich wie ein Magnet den Ball an, oder er wird ignoriert. Gut platzierte Pässe oder Flanken, nimmt der Spieler selbst nicht an, insofern diese nicht super präzise auf den Körper platziert sind. Das ist dann bei Pässen oft ärgerlich, die Millimeter an der Spielfigur vorbei ziehen, hätten die Spieler selbst, doch wie in anderen Games, dass Bein anwinkeln können oder einen kurzen Haken schlagen können. So muss man hier dem Ball anschließend hinterher laufen wie ein Hund.

Weiterhin gibt es keine richtige Ballabnahme. Im 1 gegen 1 hat der Verteidiger oft keine guten Chancen. Es gibt nur einen einfachen leichten Fußkick (was auch immer das soll) oder die direkte Grätsche, welche Zeit kostet, und dem Gegner die Chance gibt zu entkommen. Es fehlen einfach richtige Körpereinsätze, auch mal ein leichtes Gezerre am jeweils anderen, was hier und da die Dynamik und den Zweikampf fördern würde. 

Im übrigen gibt es zudem einen "Boost" Modus in welchem man, bei doppeltem Tastendruck der "Sprinttaste" , keine Ausdauer für einige wenige Sekunden verliert. Ist man im Ballbesitz, und boostet dabei, gibt der Spieler (aus welchen Gründen auch immer) den Ballbesitz auf. Gerade Anfängern passiert es dann nicht selten, dass diese weiter rennen und der Ball irgendwo hinter sich gelassen wird.

Das fehlt hier leider komplett. Entweder, du erwischst deinen Gegner mit einer Grätsche, wobei die Dauer der Animation so hoch ist, dass nach einer kurzen Stolperattacke, der Gegner selbst wieder in Ballbesitz sein kann, oder du schaffst es mit einem leichten Kick den Ball abzunehmen (ist mir kaum gelungen, vielleicht bin ich auch einfach zu schlecht).


Zum Torwart kann ich abschließend nur noch hinzufügen, dass ich es ebenso fragwürdig finde, dass sobald dieser im Besitz des Balles ist durch einen Hechtsprung mit seinen Händen, er auch ins Tor fliegen kann dabei samt Ball. Das zählt dann natürlich nicht als eigenständiges Tor. Gehalten heißt gehalten, egal wo sich der Torwart befindet.

Allerdings sollte man (schon erlebt) auch nicht selbst als Torwart im eigenen Tor stehend, einen Schuss nach vorne abgeben, denn dann ist man für Millisekunden außer Ballbesitz, und es zählt als Eigentor. 

Ich finde die Idee von Rematch ganz cool, mir fehlen hier aber grundlegende Mechaniken, wie ein richtiger Zweikampf oder eine Ballabnahme und wiederrum, ein viel zu starken Torwart, mit hoher Reichweite. 

Leider haben mir diese Aspekte den Spaß genommen. 

Ich meine, es ist ein arcarde lastiges Spiel, alles schön und gut, kann es ja auch sein. Ich möchte hier auch gar nicht auf die Communityeigenschaften eingehen, denn solche Spiele wie auch bei Rocket League und diverse andere Titel gibt es auch hier immer toxische Mitspieler. 

Mir geht es zusammenfassend darum, dass dieses Spiel aus reinen Basics bestehen. Und das führt bei einem Ballverlust in einem 3vs3 oft dazu, dass ein Zurückgewinnen der Oberhand im Zweikampf, meist nicht mehr möglich ist.

Rematch bietet Unterhaltungswert, ganz klar, auch ich werde es hin und wieder anrühren, aber mit einigen(fehlenden) Mechaniken des Produkts, sehe ich hier verschwendetes Potential.

太烂了，游戏就是鼓励你一条龙把所有对手过完，完全没有足球团队精神的游戏，传球在这个游戏里面十分的难操作，游戏没有为传球射门做任何的辅助，全靠玩家手动瞄准，传球的方向是左摇杆在传出的瞬间决定的，没有辅瞄，射门也全靠瞄准，手柄操作体验极烂，为什么有这么多前人铺路的情况下还会做成这样，接球的时候玩家不能自动去接靠近的球，要么球传的非常准直接传到人身上接住，稍微便宜点系统是不会自动帮你接球的，必须玩家手动按键来吸附球，但是没有停球的按键，我一般都是用趟球的按键来接球，就会导致球接的很大，射门射不准，传球传不准，全靠个人做花式过完全场，十分无聊的足球游戏，滚回去做武打。

- DS4 - вообще неудобно;

4. Античит хз фактически есть ли тут, мне не попадались, но говорят - читеры есть.

Premessa: io odio i giochi di calcio. Preferirei aspettare che un download da 200 GB finisca con una connessione a 56k rispetto che giocare a PES o FIFA. Ma Rematch? Rematch è un’altra storia. Un caos meraviglioso. Un delirio calcistico che, con gli amici, diventa un'esperienza indimenticabile.

Attenzione però: se avete intenzione di giocarci da soli... ripensateci. Non perché il gioco sia brutto, ma perché vi ritroverete in campo con individui degni di uno studio antropologico.

Eccone alcuni:

🕺 Il Ronaldinho del discount: 
Non passa mai, dribbla l’aria e finisce sistematicamente col perdere palla dopo un quarto di metro.

🎯 Il cecchino impazzito: 
Tira la palla da una porta all'altra sperando che gli dei del calcio siano ubriachi.

⏱️ Il possessivo ansioso: 
Se non tocca palla per 10 secondi, va in crisi esistenziale e inizia a segnare nella sua porta, perché almeno qualcuno deve fare gol.

🛑 Il Parcheggiatore di Compagni:
Sta sempre troppo vicino a te, ti ostacola, ti blocca ogni movimento, ti fa pressing a te, che sei nella sua squadra. È il peggior compagno e il miglior difensore… per gli avversari.

🗯️ Il Tifoso Tossico:
Non gioca, commenta. Ininterrottamente.
Passa più tempo a prendere i giro i compagni di squadra spammando costantemente "Bel tiro" in chat rispetto a giocare. Per lui la partita è secondaria: la vera competizione è verbale.

📢 Il DJ sempre sul pezzo:
Ha il microfono sempre acceso. Sentirai urla, discussioni di famiglia (tutte puntualmente in albanese), canzoni trap e il suo cane abbaiare. Mai una call utile, solo caos acustico puro.

🥅 Il Portiere delle Belle Speranze:
Assegnato in porta dal sistema contro la sua volontà, abbandona il ruolo per cercare la gloria in attacco.. lasciando la porta più vuota di un bar alle 3 del mattino.
Il risultato? Un gol subito che arriva più veloce del suo rimpianto. Ma chi se ne importa, l’importante è inseguire il sogno...

🐸 Il Portiere Rana Pazza:
Rimane in porta, sì... ma solo fisicamente. Mentalmente è in un’altra dimensione. Ogni azione è un pretesto per eseguire acrobazie da rana epilettica sotto caffeina.. Si lancia in ogni direzione ogni mezzo secondo, sperando forse di parare la palla, mentre il resto della squadra gioca, lui sta facendo zumba sul muschio immaginario. La palla? Probabilmente non l’ha mai vista.

Risultato: io, che mi ritrovo a difendere la porta per non prendere 5 gol in nei primi 60 secondi di gioco.

In conclusione:
Con gli amici è un’esperienza mistica. Con gli sconosciuti è una seduta di terapia.
Rematch non è solo un gioco: è una lezione di vita.
Una lezione su quanto possa essere imprevedibile la stupidità umana in un contesto sportivo virtuale.

D'entrée, je vais recommander parce que Sloclap mérite tout l'or du monde.
Néanmoins, beaucoup de points négatifs qui peuvent réellement altérer l'expérience de jeu :
-Trop de problèmes de lag/desync/frame skip , même en choisissant manuellement des serveurs européens, c'est le problème le plus urgent à l'heure actuelle
-Des problèmes de calcul de MMR, soit on tombe avec le même roster de personnes encore & encore, soit on tombe avec des first time player
-Des features mal implementées, la ranked n'est disponible qu'au niveau 5, logique jusque là, sauf qu'on peut amèner n'importe qui dans le groupe en ranked même si celui ci est niveau 1, ce qui crée des matchs ranked qui ressemble a des occasionnels.
-La communauté classique des mangeurs de merdes qui spam les émotes / tacle leur propres alliées / sabote leur équipe 
-Des interactions approximatives lorsque plus de 2 personnes intéragissent avec la balle
-Des récompenses anécdotiques, l'incentive est très très léger.

Au délà de ces points qui peuvent être très très négatifs, on retrouve réellement l'essence du FIVE, surtout si ca joue en passe, on sent la passion derrière le travail mais ca manque de finitions.

Ca vaut le coup dès maintenant, ca vaudra surement encore + le coup plus tard

En primer lugar, parece aun ser una beta con la cantidad de errores y falencias que tiene el juego. No tiene pinta de ser un Alpha.
Uno de los errores mas tilteantes es los Servers de mierda que maneja este juego. Estando en LATAM te tocan servers de 50 ping minimo, pero normalmente tocan servers de 180 de ping. Muy malos los servers.
Segundo: Los errores de la hitbox. Miles de veces pasa que siendo arquero/portero, cuando salis a tapar una pelota hacia adelante llegas primero a la pelota pero, la tiene el delantero magicamente. O, estas parado y la pelota va hacia vos pero el player no tiene respuesta alguna. No se si hay perdida de paquetes como para que de repente el delantero spawnee con la pelota, no se si es problema de lag o que pero no son errores comunes para un juego que sale 15U$D.
En tercer lugar, errores de novatos. Quienes crearon el juego los invito a que me escriban y les doy miles de ideas de como se hace un menu como la gente. En primer lugar, no hay opcion de surrender, en segundo lugar, cuando estas esperando que se una un jugador, no espera ni 10 segundos que ya te quitea del partido por falta de jugadores. En tercer lugar (Y esto es muy tilteante) SI ESTAS CON UN AMIGO, HAY UN ERROR QUE TE METE A PARTIDAS DIFERENTES A AMBOS. En fin, les regalo un par de ideas, porque se ve que se apuraron por lucrar y sacaron el alpha muy rapido.
- Competitivo 3v3 / 4v4 / 5v5
- Mas tutoriales / Training
- Sistema de trading de inventario
- Opcion surrender al quitear un jugador. Tambien opcion de quitear de la partida, para poder dar opcion de surrender a quienes aun estan en el server.
- Sistema de BANEO. Reports para jugadores, y baneo para quienes quiteen de partidas competitivas.
- Buscar servers con mejor ping, aun esperando mas para la partida. Noté que encuentra partida muy facil, pero por esto sacrifica buenos servidores a quien lo jueguen. No se si estan escasos de servidores o que.
- Mapas de comunidad para training
- Menu de partida personalizada mejor hecho. Ya que cuando invitas a alguien y este se une a la partida personalizada, en el menu de su pantalla tiene que apretar una opcion que no es muy intuitiva a la vista, ni esta muy bien mostrado tampoco. El menu es muy primario. Mal hecho
- (No lo viví yo, pero al parecer vi muchos que dicen que esta mal optimizado el juego).
- Mejor distribucion de las teclas por default. POR DIOS. Es un asco los botones que ponen por default, hay que cambiar todo. Tan mal hicieron todo?
En fin, finalizando, este juego tiene un 2/10. Falta mucho por pulir, principalmente podria ser competitivo de no ser porque el sistema de puntajes es malisimo (Ganas, te dan 20 puntos. Perdes, te quitan 18, independientemente de tu score en la partida). Es por esto que el competitivo no tiene mucho sentido, tambien porque de 5 personas que te cruzas, 3 trollean, y parece ser un juego con mucha connotacion en que debe ser en equipo. Falta por mejorar muchisimo, por lo que veo el juego Alpha es lo mismo que era la beta hasta hace unas semanas.
Управление показалось неинтуитивным, но привыкнуть можно. Играется весело и в механиках не так зубодробительно как в рокет лиге.

Game is pretty dead now. You can only find ranked 3v3 in Australia, which is NOT the football experience I very much enjoyed. This game is meant for 5v5, and them caving in to ranked 3v3 requests has ruined the prospects of the game.
Not just this, but somehow the game is more unstable. At release, people were having weird goals occur where the ball was clearly being controlled by a player not even near the box of the goal. Teleporting ball due to connection stuff. Never had that for me, I assume Australia server was unaffected. Now though, after the cross-platform update, ♥♥♥♥ happens regularly. The game was pretty busted at launch, but somehow hasn't been ironed out properly yet - somehow worse.

Along with this, it also has to be stated:
If you are playing this by yourself... I hope you are patient and can handle toxic players.
If you are good at football and understand positional play... same thing.
This game is seemingly filled with players who think everyone that places a pass slightly wrong is a ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥, and that they're better off taking on the whole team by themselves.
You can feed every goal to your team mates, but they're all so self-absorbed that they won't notice or understand that it is all because of the passes that you help create.

This game legitimately makes me saltier than I've ever been playing a game, and that's not good for me. I don't like it.
Also yeah they're great at adding heaps more micro-transaction stuff but ♥♥♥♥ still broken.

ORIGINAL REVIEW:
Getting the main gripes out of the way:
- Premium + F2P-like monetisation: yeah look it isn't that defensible. It's a steep price that I wish wasn't there in order to have my hesitant mates take the plunge. Not everyone got to test the beta for free to know its worth the price.
- Technical problems: Still has some buggy interactions, some rubberbanding, but honestly the server-related problems have mostly disappeared for me, but that may be due to the Australian server. I hear it is still kinda dodgy on others, YMMV.
- Amount of content for price: Again, ties into the first point. This has only 3v3, 4v4, 5v5, and 5v5 ranked. Custom matches too. Very barebones career stats, no match history. No commendation or report systems. No crossplay (yet).

All of that ♥♥♥♥ would put me off even a $15 game. But this ♥♥♥♥ is that ♥♥♥♥♥♥ good that I don't give a damn. If you have played soccer IRL and enjoy it, you'll love it. If you watch soccer, you'll love it. If you don't do either of those but like a technical team-based game ala League of Legends etc, you'll dig it too.

Наиграл в Rematch около 13 часов, и, честно говоря, был приятно удивлён. Это не FIFA и не PES — это что-то совсем другое. Здесь ты не управляешь всей командой сразу, ты — один из игроков на поле. И это ощущается совершенно по-другому: реально, будто ты сам участвуешь в матче.

В первую очередь хочется отметить динамику. Матчи быстрые, напряжённые и весёлые. Каждый игрок — живой человек, поэтому никогда не знаешь, чего ожидать. Где-то кто-то делает классную подачу, где-то вратарь творит чудеса, а иногда просто случаются комичные моменты, когда кто-то вместо удара делает финт в другую сторону и все начинают угорать.

Управление простое, но в то же время требует скилла. Нужно вовремя пасовать, открываться, бегать по позициям, не терять мяч. Игра награждает командную игру — в одиночку тут не потащишь, особенно на высоком уровне. Когда играешь с друзьями и общаешься в голосе — это вообще отдельный кайф, особенно когда отыгрываешь красивые комбинации или побеждаешь в жёстком матче.

За 13 часов уже успел попробовать разные роли — от нападающего до вратаря. Интересно, что у каждой позиции свой стиль игры, и чувствуется, как ты вливаешься в команду, особенно если попадаешь в матч с людьми, которые играют с умом, а не просто бегают как попало.

Графика приятная, стилистика — не гиперреализм, но и не мультяшка. Интерфейс минималистичный и понятный. Серверы работают стабильно, задержки почти не ощущаются, хотя, конечно, от пинга многое зависит — был матч, где всё чуть-чуть лагало, и это подпортило впечатление.

Что бы хотелось улучшить — это, пожалуй, систему прокачки и кастомизации. Пока всё довольно базово, но потенциал огромный. Также хотелось бы, чтобы матчмейкинг чуть лучше подбирал по уровню. Иногда попадаешься с игроками, которые только зашли — и матч превращается в хаос.

В целом, Rematch — это отличный онлайн-футбол для тех, кто хочет почувствовать себя частью команды, а не просто управлять ботами. Тут реально важен каждый игрок, и это создаёт уникальные ситуации в каждом матче.
Если разработчики продолжат развивать проект — может получиться что-то реально большое. А пока — играю, учусь, веселюсь и потихоньку втягиваюсь всё больше.

UPDATE: After 35hrs, I want to edit my reviews and do the switcheroo to giving my recommendation.

You cannot do anything about other players' behavior on the pitch, but the game can be a lot of fun in "higher" ELOs and when playing with friends in a team. At this point in time, you need to get familiar with the clunky controls and there is no way around it but to relax and take your time with it. Apparently, the devs commited to making customized button mapping possible without 3rd party tools, so that former complaint of mine is hopefully soon to be solved.

What is a non-negotiable issue is the netcode and lags. It NEEDS to get better, desperately. I'm in Europe and the game can be close to unplayable in the later evening hours. My guess is that the servers just cannot handle the amount of players logged in at the same time. This leads to desyncing the position of the ball, the players, and ultimately in goals that should not happen.

Still, when Rematch works, it REALLY works. Try to get it on a sale as long as connectivity issues are not solved. Then it's worth the already not all too high price. Maybe could've used a longer early access.

The game feels great which makes you feel the need to keep playing, The game constantly has ping as an issue. Whoever has better ping wins a lot of things and just has an overall advantage. It is annoying to see the ball score, then rubberband back at the goalies hand. Same with stealing balls or keeping them. For a fast pace competitive team game, you need great ping. That's a given in competitive. But the differences in ping for each player each game is so vastly different that it's noticeable in 70% of the matches. It also has its random glitches. Like floating with the ball by passing it against the wall over and over. Passing it and somehow jumping up to lob it over higher. I've seen someone get out of the map already. This game should be considered early access. It's not fun if you expect every match to run nicely. You gotta just expect the lag and that isn't a game worth $30. Im just keeping it in hopes they work on connectivity and fix some of the glitches. Will update this in the future.

Un match de foot, en 3vs3, 4vs4 ou 5vs5. Dynamique, rapide et intense. Facile à prendre en main mais difficile à maîtriser. Les graphismes sont vraiment propre à l'image de Sifu ou Absolver. Le fun est clairement présent et je n'ai jamais autant apprécier un jeu de foot. Je le recommande vivement. 
Les seuls bémols sont une petite partie de la communauté :
-Les joueurs qui veulent dribbler toute l'équipe adverse mais qui se fait toujours avoir. Mais qui réessaie quand même.. à chaque fois. 
-Le goalie qui veut toujours marquer mais qui file la balle à l'autre camp à chaque dégagement.
-Le Russe qui spamme "Beau Boulot" dès que vous faites la moindre erreur.
-Le gars du fond qui ne reviendra jamais en défense. Et qui manquera son but même si les cages adverses sont vides. 
-Le joueur qui est sur sa losing-streak et qui quittera dès le premier but encaisser.
-Les joueurs qui se mettent à 2 ou a 3 sur le même gars et qui n'arrive pas à lui enlever le ballon.
Jouer avec des amis amène ce jeu à un tout autre niveau et est vivement recommandé.

Итак наиграв в эту "прекрасную" игру, могу выделить несколько аспектов, которые не дадут вас заскучать.
1. Начнем с очевидного - рассинхрон с мячом, а в некоторых моментах и с игрой в целом ( бывали моменты, когда ты летишь сопернику подкатом прямо в ноги, а потом на реплее гола ты видишь, что ты летишь не в ноги а куда-то в Сызрань навестить того кто это создал. Стоя на воротах готовьтесь к тому, что у вас элементарно не будет конектить мяч к рукам, хотя как вы же поймали, а вот я сам в душе не чаю , кто создал это шарообразное дьявольское отродье берущие все кроме вас.
2. Тиммейты. Представьте ситуацию: вам прилетел мяч и вы уже бежите к воротам врага, но что делают ваши тиммейты? Правильно спамят кнопку паса, и при возможности отбирают мяч, кричя вам в войс что вы бездарность и вообще они эгоисты и они сами знают как надо играть. Потому что у них скин Бачиры и они с криком "ЫЫЫЫ Я ЭГОИСТ" идут пр"ебывать мяч. Лучше всего играть с друзьями, минимум с двумя, т.к если вы зайдете в режим 3v3, то к вам обязательно зайдет отморозок, который будет руинить мяч, и отдавать пас чужому вратарю. Однако если вы попадетесь с дуэтом бомбардиров, поймете что все это время отморозком были вы.
3. Третий не относящийся к игре а одному органу в правительстве, чье решение заставило меня три часа искать путь как присоединиться к серверам, чтобы тебя не выкидывало посередине катки. 

Короче игра пока сыроватая, не хватает репортов, текстового чата, более менее стабильного мяча и исправления небольших багов. Не говорю что игра плохая, она мне понравилась, но есть парочку минусов которые подпортили ощущения. Поиграть с компанией друзей вечером будет самое то. Рекомендую. 10 португальцев оруших в войс из 10

Let me start off by saying the game is alright, it mostly the other players that drive me to literal insanity. 

They beg and beg and beg to have the ball passed to them. So I do it, out of the kindness of my heart.
and what I get in return is probably one of the most downright horrendous, abysmal ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ shots on goal I have ever seen in my entire existence on planet earth. Now that's not really time, roughly 25 years. It really all started to go down hill on my 12th birthday when I got an Xbox 360. While I love playing it on summer nights and school nights after finishing my very difficult math homework. (I failed algebra 3 times) but I would get on the game and play some Modern Warfare 2 search and destroy. 
You're all probably wondering what any of this has to do with the soccer game known as "Rematch".
Stick with me now, I'm slowly but surely getting there.
The major landslide in this downfall was when I got my first gaming PC.
I would play games like Rust which would be beat me down into a pulp because of Chinese Zergs, and roof campers. 
Now I decided lets try some more calm and relaxing games that arent as focused on PVP like Stardew Valley, and Balatro. 
So while I was browsing the new games last week I saw Rematch! While being a big fan of Soccer and Rocket League, I said "lets give this a try". 
Now that bring us to here. The ranked 5v5 teammates literally make me want to pull my hair out, meanwhile the game is crashing and wont let me launch. Im currently fixing it. and will continue to play this.

10/10 would reccomend I suppose.

As much as I love this game, I hate to say that it is currently unbalanced and unstable at the time. I would highly suggest picking this up when the game has received a couple of major patches. The reason I say this is because there are a few mechanics that need to be fixed and the servers have below average connection stability. An example of the server stability would be when I kick it out of someone's feet the ball would disappear and end up back in their feet pushing the ball forward towards my goal. Another example, would be having 55 - 65 ping and people are teleporting constantly and you have no clue what is going on. 

Moving on to the mechanics there needs to be slight touch ups to the dribbling. When I dribble while someone is challenging me, I feel that there should be at least an I-Frame to negate their challenge because one the dribble stance only shifts you to the direction you are dribbling with barely any distance between you and the opponent which after the enemy challenges they can instantly challenge again. If this is not possible then the developers should increase the cooldown between each challenge because the mechanic feels completely useless unless an opponent slides at you and misses.

The pushing forward mechanic is not bad, but there have been times where I push through a defender which is not in a defensive stance (this allows you to stop the ball if it is passed or shot through you) and the defender would immediately take possession when I should have just pushed it passed them. 

The last thing that would make this game much better would be removing the mini map. There is absolutely no reason to have this since there is voice chat in game. Also the sound queues for running and shouting are already really good to let you know that an opponent is near so you should be able to avoid them without this. Removing the map would make this game more immersive to the soccer / bluelock experience people seek when playing this game. I would also like to add that the game is 3rd person so you can just look behind you while you run to the ball to see the opponents and your team. 

Once these issues are resolved I think rematch will be one of the best sports games out there. Until then, this game can be a bit disappointing at times. However, I know the devs are already working on server optimization which will definitely make your experience better. I have high hopes for this game and I look forward to its future.

Eine absolute Zumutung – völlig unverständlich, wie dieses Spiel positiv bewertet wird

Wie man dieses Spiel größtenteils positiv bewerten kann, ist mir ein Rätsel. Es handelt sich hierbei um eine absolute Zumutung. Nach nahezu jeder zweiten Runde wird entweder ein Mitspieler oder man selbst grundlos aus dem Spiel geworfen – ein Umstand, der das gesamte Spielerlebnis massiv beeinträchtigt.

Dazu kommt der vollkommen überzogene Preis von 20 Euro für ein derart instabiles und unausgereiftes Produkt. Und als wäre das nicht schon dreist genug, wird obendrein noch ein kostenpflichtiger Battle Pass angeboten.

Wie es möglich ist, ein derart unausgereiftes und frustrierendes Spiel auf den Markt zu bringen – und dann auch noch mit solch aggressiver Monetarisierung – bleibt mir völlig unverständlich. So ein rotzfreches Geschäftsmodell spottet jeder Beschreibung.

Je m'amuse énormément sur ce jeu, j'y joue depuis l'alpha fermé et beaucoup de chose ont changé dans la stabilité du Gameplay.

Mais malheureusement on a toujours aucun moyen de reports les clown de la game.
Il y a des joueurs qui jouent comme si ils étaient payé par une asso pour détruire ta game en ranked et je ne parle pas d'un manque d'expérience ou d'un niveau bas mais d'un troll monumental que ce soit sur le terrain ou dans le chat vocal...c'est généralement dans des games 3V3 ou tes mates décident par pur hasard de marquer contre leur camps et de chanter en voc ? bon... ( et pas qu'une fois) 
Il existe encore plusieurs bugs qui peuvent casser la game, des bugs qui font arrêter l'équipe adverse et donc ça fini en 5V0 en Ranked (ce qui explique pourquoi il y a autant de joueurs rank max). Spam la frappe de balle avec la tête pour commencer à flotter dans les airs, encore beaucoup de bugs de synchronisation de la balle (qu'on voit aussi dans le replay en cas de goal).

Je note positive car c'est plutôt des bugs de lancement de jeux ou des fonctionnalités qui arrivent sûrement bientôt, le jeu est extrêmement amusant avec nos potes et très satisfaisant à jouer. On a besoin de nouveaux modes de jeux et d'un peu plus de stabilité également. Une meilleur synchronisation encore !

J'ai acheté le jeu pensant pouvoir jouer avec mon ami qui a le jeu via le Gamepass.
Quelle surprise quand il m'apprends qu'on peut pas pendant que je fais le tuto. (C'est fix).

+ les passes à la souris c'est chiant. (Ça va en vrai, c'est devenu jouable au clavier / souris).

Edit : J'ai fait le free week, ben les 2 premières parties les équipes en face sont vides, la seconde jsuis pendant l'intégralité de la partie dans un bug qui m'empêche complètement de jouer (position dans les airs, incapacité de faire des actions à part bouger, le ballon me passe au travers), on se coince dans le coin avec un allié pendant quelques secondes on peut pas bouger, une déco et deux pour celui avec qui je jouais, des kékés du ballon qui font dix tricks à la seconde impossible à dribler. 

Et tout ça en moins de 10 parties BON, c'est toujours aussi naze, j'aime pas.

Le jeu est vraiment bien, une vraie sensation de réussite quand on arrive à faire de magnifique passe ou devenir l’égoïste qu'on pense être à dribbler plusieurs adversaires seul (bande de gros toxic que vous êtes surtout).

Bref le jeu mérite un avis positif comme son prédécesseur.

Mais du coup pourquoi j'ai rien compris et je mets un avis négatif ?

Tout simplement parce que le jeu est sortie dans le même état que la première beta fermée (la 2eme étant vraiment la pire version du jeu)

Crash incessant, parfois ca vous kick du jeu et parfois ca vous retire les fonctions en ligne en pleine partie classé.

Déjà que Rank up dans le jeu est dur en tant que personne sans amis, mais quand on a enfin une équipe qui communique mais qu'on crash à cause d'un jeu sortie sans nette amélioration par rapport à la beta, ca fou les boules.

De plus des grosses chutes de frame qui nous font perdre un peu nos moyens sont assez fréquent.

J'ignore encore les bugs de textures, les replay qui bug, nos accessoires qui prennent une couleur verte vomi.

EN RÉSUMÉ : Qu'est-ce qui a changé concrètement depuis la BETA, bah.. pas grand chose à par l'ajout d'une introduction et une meilleure maniabilité du clavier souris mais oubliez quand même, c'est juste meilleur, pas jouable nuance.

Bref je changerai mon avis quand le jeu sera un jeu jouable quoi ^^

Rematch — это свежий взгляд на футбол в формате аркадной соревновательной игры. Здесь каждый матч наполнен драйвом и неожиданностями, а увлекательный геймплей заставляет возвращаться снова и снова. Особенно круто собраться командой друзей и показать слаженную игру, ведь победа зависит от каждого участника.

Плюсы:
- Одна из лучших футбольных аркад на сегодняшний день: динамично и захватывающе.
- Интуитивно понятные механики.
- Настоящая командная игра: без синергии не победить, каждое действие важно.
- Приятная графика и анимации: мяч, поле и персонажи выглядят живо и красочно.

Минусы:
- Скудная кастомизация.
- Баги, которые пока заметны:
Некорректная выдача наград в боевом пропуске.
Редкие вылеты из игры.
Отмена поиска матча не всегда работает — всё равно попадаешь в матч.
В одном рейтинговом матче мяч завис на месте, и игра длилась вечно до выхода всех. Невозможно начать другой матч из-за этого.
- Сильная зависимость от тиммейтов: единственный слабый игрок может свести на нет усилия всей команды.
- Отсутствие функции репорта и голосования за кик: порой лучше 4 на 5, чем с тем, кто сознательно саботирует.
- Проблемы с управлением мышью: пасы иногда уходят в случайном направлении.

Предложения:
- Ввести систему репортов и голосование за исключение игроков из матча.
- Добавить структуру клубов (аналог кланов) с собственными турнирами и кастомизацией.
- Расширить форматы турниров.
- Переработать начисление очков в рейтинговом матче.

Заключение:
Эта игра действительно стоящая внимания аркада про футбол, особенно если играть с друзьями. Несмотря на текущие недоработки и баги, у проекта огромный потенциал стать одной из самых популярных командных игр в своём жанре.

It needs some work, but it's already a lot of fun. Even with the wild shots, walls and lack of fouls, Rematch manages to encapsulate the core of football. Individual skill and team synergy are both important, and the fundamental positional concepts of football hold true in Rematch.

There are some issues though:
This game is buggy right now. Most of the time it's just funny, but occasionally there are match breaking bugs, and I have had the game crash a couple times. Sometimes balls go through players without reason. Sometimes the ball teleports. Sometimes the ball gets stuck to the ground. I personally trust that these issues will be fixed eventually, but I can enjoy the game anyway.

I would appreciate a CPU to replace players who ragequit in matches, which happens far too often both in quick matches and on ranked. Playing 1 v 5 is incredibly annoying.

Matches should not be able to start without sufficient players. Again, permanent numerical advantages ruin matches. A CPU could be another answer to this problem.


If you are overly competitive, have a habit of ragequitting, enjoy sarcastically congratulating your teammates' every mistake or think you are Neymar and will never pass the ball, this game isn't for you. Leave everyone else alone.

Otherwise, this game is fun. Worth $30 right now? I don't know. It is to me, but I think it will be for others too as bugs get fixed and general stablility is improved.

It's not a bad game and I'll continue to play, but I am disappointed that it turned out to be an "animation game" like FIFA instead of a "physics game" like Rocket League.

For example: I don't like that you can slide tackle through the ball to no effect because the opposing player has possession and has started doing a rainbow, which pauses the ball physics while the rainbow animation completes. In games like rocket league and slapshot rebound the physics are always "live" and no special animation can prevent other players from affecting the ball or puck. There isn't even a concept of "possession" as far as the game physics are concerned.

Especially in sports games, I prefer a consistent set of physics which are always fairly represented on screen. It makes the game less about memorizing arbitrary animation rules/timing (like fighting games) and more about understanding how to bend the physics sandbox to your will. I find the latter more fun. Both types of games require skill and plenty of folks prefer the former (super smash bros, street fighter, etc...) but I like the physics sandbox more. To me, drifting in beamng is more fun than drifting in need for speed. Etc...

So anyways, I personally was bummed to find that the gameplay of rematch is not like a physics sandbox, and if that's what you're after then I can't recommend this game. But other aspects of the game are really great: the sound design (footsteps getting louder with approaching defenders + ball calls like "line" and "keeper" reflecting teammates' positioning without having to actually look for the ball icon on screen), and the art style & music also give the game a great pick up soccer atmosphere. Overall it's a fun game but I'll never enjoy the core gameplay as much as rocket league unfortunately.

Захватывающая ли эта игра?
- Невероятно захватывающая. Каждая катка сопровождается притоком адреналина. Каждый забитый гол пробуждает каждую клеточку твоего тела, отвечающую за удовольствие. Каждая новая победа заставляет тебя всё вновь и вновь начинать поиск новой игры.

Весёлая ли эта игра?
- О да, веселья здесь хоть отбавляй. Вас ждёт куча комичных ситуаций, куча странных рандомов и куча просто фана от игры.

Почему эта игра стоит внимания?
- Потому что это уникальный продукт. Это по-настоящему глоток свежего воздуха в индустрии видеоигр. Она подарит тебе незабываемые часы, которые ты проведёшь не в дотке или кске, где ты итак провёл пол своей жизни и давно перестал получать удовольствие и превратил игры в рутину.

А какие у игры минусы?
- Глупо будет скрывать, что игра довольно сырая. Зачастую случаются баги, вылеты, неполадки с соединением, плохой пинг. Но сильно ли это влияет на геймплей? Да нет, ничего сверхъестествённого. Всё терпимо.

А что в итоге?
- В итоге рекомендую каждому, даже тому, кто равнодушен к футболу или даже недолюбливает его, попробовать эту игру. Лично для меня она окупилась спустя игры 3-4, когда я понял, что она из себя представляет. This is hopefully a temporary thumb down ( 6/24/2025 )

The game brings back those "street soccer" vibes to life with its "simple to understand hard to master" controls, very fast paced and competitive, where coordination is the key to victory, at a comfortable price considering it's a live service game (that is if you don't mind battle passes and aesthetic).

The success of the game means very fast matchmaking times, allowing for a lot of game time.

- The game has some serious networking/netcoding issues, where even if ping is stable at 50ms to 80ms with 0% packet loss, lots of times you end up wondering why your opponent got the ball instead of you, tackles feel you are playing a coin flip with the server and you see your character doing actions that are not coherent with the ball movement.

- There are some bugs in the main menu and other sections, lots of options are disabled and even if the game is meant to be played with a controller some UI elements must be tweaked with mouse and keyboard

- Game might crash after playing for a while, the more you switch from matchmaking to menu the more frequent the crashes

- Considering the widespread success of the game, it should be expected to invest in more server locations, especially in the EU where soccer is wildly popular in every country, that would also fix some of the network issues

- "Mercy rule" feels more like "let's waste even more of your time rule". Some games are meant to be lost, especially when there's a huge gap in the two teams skills and experience, just let them end as quickly as possible so you can queue again

- No forfeit vote, this hits hard especially when playing ranked and people are quitting, this adds to the terrible mercy rule

- Currently there's a sort of "meta" on how to play, probably adding to the netcoding issues, if you are on the offense, most people go for a shoot to the wall and volley shoot from bounce back instead of crossing or trying to score in a more interesting manner, this is because it gets harder for the goalkeeper to deal with "ball linking/grabbing" actions especially when the server runs badly. On defence, sliding tackle seems to have a priority over dribbling in almost all scenarios, there's little to no drawback from tackle sliding which tends to stop the game and stucking things up in corners and on the sides of the pitch. Trying to jump (LT/L2 + Y/Triangle) to stop an aerial ball is almost always useless.

- Very poor and limited in-game communication tools, except for calling out for a pass, there's no way to communicate any other useful information, a good order wheel with more things you can say to your teammates is desperately needed. There's also some work to do about existing emote priority and chat cooldowns

With this said, it's a good game, animation and movements are solid, it takes time to actually learn all the possibilities you have with your character movement.

Unless you are in a rush to get battle passes, early asthetic and so on, I wouldn't recommend buying it now, I would expect the Devs to take these early days from release to find out what works and fix what doesn't

Aside from the enjoyable gameplay mechanics—which I consider the most important part of any game—this title is overloaded with microtransaction-ready content, despite its €25 price tag. And when I say "overloaded," I mean it: nearly every aspect of your character, and even stadium customization (which others are forced to see whenever you score), is monetized. Some stadium colors are so aggressive they literally make my eyes hurt, and I'm forced to play on the stadium chosen by the scoring player. I would strongly prefer if stadium visuals were only a personal setting rather than something imposed on opponents.

Another issue is the way the game seems to push certain social messages. For example, when selecting your team, you're given a choice between "Home" and "Away"—a purely cosmetic option that only affects jersey colors. Since most players naturally choose "Home" to retain their primary colors, the default "Away" outfit ends up being pink. As a result, your opponent is dressed head-to-toe in pink about 90% of the time. Whether intentional or not, it feels like a forced exposure to a specific ideology, particularly when it's reinforced by other visible elements like constant LGBT-themed signs scattered throughout the game.

Gameplay is smooth, creative, and satisfying. It's a bit crashy and unoptimised, and the price point is reasonable but it's not as easy a sell to friends as it could be. Overall worth it imo.

Edit: Changing my review to negative, the game hasn't been developed mechanically at all and has many issues that the team hasn't bothered addressing in patches. Backpassing to pick up is allowed so any organised pair can timewaste almost forever. Weird, unintuitive, and uninteractive solo dribbling is everywhere. The netcode has remained poor, and the game is still poorly optimised. Generally, defending feels bad, and a lot of the time a good attacking strategy is just to kick it up to a  someone who tries a first-time overhead kick that's impossible to interact with if the game decides it's going to happen.

Overall, it's still a fun party game with friends but there's no real interest from the devs in creating a game that's mechanically smooth and interesting to play as a team. It's also not displaying the things that are interesting about actual football, even though it could with some changes.

Это, конечно, поправимо, и играть можно, но неужели разработчики не понимают, что когда вы делаете сетевую игру, то всё выше перечисленное должно отсутствовать на релизе? This game is quite fun. it's better with friends, but it is still very fun solo. from my basic understanding of this game, it is meant for 2 kinds of players. Fifa players who want a soccer game that DOESN'T suck balls, and Rocket League players who want a soccer game that DOESN'T suck balls.

In it's early stage, both players may be disappointed since this game is certainly not without it's flaws. lots of bugs, mostly minor but still, disconnect issues, unintuitive training options, and an easy concept that's brutally hard to get mastered. 

This game has a LOT of potential. It very much reminds me of 2015 rocket league when we were all making fun of the physics and the ridiculous ♥♥♥♥ you could do. then Rocket League developed into a game worth spending thousands of hours on.

I am making the prediction now that is sloclap goes a similar route as psyonix (except the selling out to epic part. for the love of ♥♥♥♥ sloclap do NOT sell out to epic games) this game will be in a similar position to RL in 10 years where it is one of the simplest esport games to understand and watch, but one of the most difficult to be good at. 

I can easily see Rematch belonging to a group of psuedo-tier1 esports like rocket league. games that feel like real sports and can be easily watched and understood by the general public in events such as the olympics, xgames, and televised tournaments, just like rocket league.

The game is incredibly fun and i will continue to sink hours into this game. RL is my first love, but Rematch is a wonderful alternative when my RL teammates decide to throw the game causing me to throw my controller across the room because it's literally physically impossible for me to make a mistake in Rocket League literally ever. It's always my teammates fault.

Jogo bom, divertido, engraçado e por vezes estressante (a comunidade às vezes é muito punitiva). Porém, agora no lançamento o jogo não vale os 90 reais. Comprei porque vendi algumas skins de CS. Espere para comprar quando tiver 50 reais. De todo modo, esse jogo tem muito mais cara de um jogo que devia ter sido free-to-play (e espero que se torne no futuro) assim como o Rocket League se tornou. 
A falta do cross-play não é sentida por ser lançamento do jogo e há jogadores em qualquer momento, mas quanto antes o cross-play sair, melhor.
Alguns bugs são irritantes, e acredito que tenham a ver com falta de performance de conexão do jogo, por exemplo: meu amigo, esses dias, ficou com um bug numa partida inteira em que a bola não tinha física pra ele (ele não conseguia tocar na bola); erros de animação em que a animação que você está fazendo de chute/bicicleta/cabeçada é cancelada (especialmente crucial se vc está na zaga tentando afastar um cruzamento), animação do goleiro (em que, por vezes, o chute do adversário não "pede" nenhuma ponte, e seu personagem começa uma simples animação de deitar para o lado, mas ela é cancelada porque o chute na verdade foi mais para o lado ainda e vc toma o gol). Enfim, parece haver um descompasso com o clientside/serverside que pode gerar frustrações e desentendimentos com seu time. Mas é um ótimo jogo para jogar com amigos!

現実のサッカーでテンポを落とすファールやオフサイド、アウトオブプレーがなく常時ハイスピードなプレイに晒される。お菓子をつまむ余裕もない。人数やポジション、プレイ感覚としてはサッカーというよりバスケに近くポスト外へのシュートのリバウンドの処理もバスケっぽさがある。
プレイヤーにはあらゆるパラメーターが存在せず、フィールドの全員が自身のゲームスキルのみを糧にプレイするストロングスタイル。操作や他プレイヤーとの連携はかなり難しめだが、それ故にシュートを決めた時はもちろんパスがかみ合ってアシストを決めた時すら強いガッツポーズがでる。

発売初日はかなりマッチングまわりやクラッシュがあったが、今はかなり改善されている。
rematchというよりrecruitと言った感じのマッチング速度が今や爆速になっており、リザルトが表示し終えたら即rematchする。クラッシュもほぼほぼしなくなった。いろんな曜日のいろんな時間帯でプレイしたがおおよそ解決したのでは。

現状全員手探り状態で、多種多様なプレイが展開されているのもおもしろい。
正直数カ月経てばプレイの定石が固まりすぎてしまうのではないかと懸念している。今しかできない玉石混交、百人百様なプレイ体験を逃すのはかなりもったいない。早めに買うのをおススメする。
一緒に、パスを受け取り損ねた味方を「終わってる！」とののしり、枠外にシュートを打つ自分に「終わってる！」と頭を抱えよう。
Estaria bueno que para jugar este juego te hagan hacer un test de IQ porque la cantidad de retrasados mentales que hay (hasta en platino) es terrible. Muy buen juego, jugalo.

[h1]The Best Sports Game In a Decade[/h1]

I've played Rematch for over 50 hours now (30 hours in Beta) and I can say I've experienced it enough to review it. Rematch has been on my radar since it was first announced since I am a sucker for interesting spins on football like Rocket League. I have 800 hours on RL, another legendary game. Now we finally have an interesting sports game that's actually top quality after 10 years. Rematch is very good, and most importantly, very fun!

[h3]Great Game Design[/h3]

Rematch is very well designed overall and I don't have anything to criticize about the gameplay. The street football gameplay, the fact that there are no rules, the mechanics, the stamina system, and the match length, all feel very in place. It has great visuals, Sloclap managed to create their own art style that both looks amazing and screams Sloclap at the same time, phenomenal!

[h3]A small list of what I think should be added asap;[/h3]

-ranked 3v3 and 4v4, maybe even 2v2 in a small field 
-text chat, all chat 
-report system
-crossplay integration 
-more and better content such as;
-interesting battle passes, better cosmetics, and more goal celebrations, especially with teammates would be awesome. 
-interesting themed maps, like the space one. 
-collaborations with other games/footballers
-more varied and better in-match music, as it wears down very quickly.

[h3]Minor Issues[/h3]

Good optimization, even though rare crashes occur. Some networking issues, and minor bugs here and there. The game also stutters for a second when a goal is scored sometimes. I am sure they will be solved since most of the issues have been solved since the beta.

[h3]Conclusion[/h3]

Sloclap really doesn't miss, I've recently played Sifu and can absolutely say that they are an extremely talented indie/small studio. As they are a small team, the changes and extra content we ask for may take some time, but I hope they can deliver as soon as possible. I really don't want to see a game of this quality lose most of its playerbase just like The Finals, another peak game. Take notes EA and 2K, this is how you create a fun experience for the player. Rematch is my current favorite for best indie game of the year.

Effettivamente Rocket League ma con calciatori. Tendo a consigliare questo titolo per 2 motivi fondamentali.
1. Microtransazioni.
Proprio come su Rocket league ci saranno contenuti SOLO estetici. Ogni giocatore avrà sempre le stesse statistiche di corsa, di tiro, ecc.
2. Longevità del titolo.
È un gioco che si appresta ad essere al pari di Rocket league. Essendo un titolo calcistico le possibilità di avere accordi commerciali con sponsor di qualunque titolo sono elevatissime, pertanto giocarlo fin dal principio può portare a dei vantaggi all'interno di community e team competitivi.

Al lancio ha presentato sicuramente dei problemi. Tra stabilità dei server e qualche cosa nel gameplay che non ha del tutto convinto. Tuttavia la base c'è e il gioco risulta essere divertente anche senza dover giocare per la vita.

Refazendo minha analise depois de 1 mes jogando o jogo pós lançamento, sinceramente se tivesse como pegar meu dinehiro de volta pegaria sem pensar, o jogo veio a um preço muito alto no Brasil e não entregou as melhorias que eu esperava do beta, na real parece que piorou bastante. A posição de goleiro está patetica, 40% das bolas que você pega certinho pulando no time certo o personagem faz animação de catch e mesmo assim a bola passa e é gol, o sistema de prioridade de bola é muito confuso tem hora q estou com a bola passa 3 pessoas do meu lado e a bola so gruda no pé deles, o passe no mouse/teclado é todo bugado, e depois do ultimo update na data que estou escrevendo você vai driblar e a bola entra no chão ou simplesmente começa a flutuar para um lado e depois volta pro seu pé, o sistema de replay esta maims bugado doq nunca. E tudo isso que eu citei esta fora do sistema doq seria a parte competitiva do jogo, o jogo tem um matchmaking horrivel, onde prata/bronze pode cair ate com diamante, ta cheio de troll no jogo pois o proprio nao possui um sistema de report, e fazer isso num jogo onde tem chat de voz é assustador, q quantidade de discurso de odio que ja ouvi nesse jogo ultrapassa o de jogadores de lol.

Enfim se você gosta de pagar caro para passar raiva 80% do tempo e se divertir 20% vai fundo do contrarario espere, pois se os devs não agirem rapido o jogo morre ate o fim do ano, achei o jogo com uma proposta incrivel, mas eles deviam ter feitos mais betas ou ter lançado o jogo a 24 reais, isso pq a empresa uma vez disse "Se você fizer um jogo bom o bastante, único o bastante, com um preço justo, os jogadores irão aderir"

I bought this after playing ~20 hours on Xbox Gamepass. I have a somewhat unique perspective on the game. I bought it because I do find it fun and want my progression to be on Steam. While there are issues that I wont regurgitate, there are also other matters which I think people need to know about.

[h2]Progression[/h2]

The game is entirely focused on a six month battle pass and an additional [i]AU$15[/i] on top for a premium version - named the "Captain pass". Split up in three "seasons" and released every two months. Each level up in the game means a level in the pass, and will provide an item: Cosmetics, gems (earned naturally over time), or coins (premium currency). Gems and coins can be spent in the in-game shop to buy items that [i]may[/i] not exist in the battle pass for that season. Coins are needed to buy the pass, however the pass itself only provides half the needed currency for the next. Everything is standard so that people who want to customise and "progress", spend more money.

[h2]Input[/h2]

The Xbox version and Steam release do not share the same input functionality. Xbox allows keyboard and Xbox controller, while Steam additionally allows PlayStation controllers. "Aha! That would be because Steam input is handling it!" you might say. But I retort: The Steam release has built-in compatibility with all standard controllers, including DualShock and DualSense, and replaces icons with PlayStation icons. Steam input does not use different icons and the compatibility only exists in the Steam release. It is bizarre given that I have played games on the Xbox app before that have compatibility with DualSense controllers.

[h2]Account linking and Crossplay[/h2]

No crossplay implemented yet. "bUt ThEy SaId CrOsSpLaY iS cOmMiNg!". I know, I know. They released an [url="https://playrematch.com/post/rematch-launch-priorities-next-steps"]official blog post[/url] detailing their priorities after release. It is also a full game release, not early access, and released to higher paying customers 72 hours earlier. I get to complain about features when priorities during development revolved around getting people to pay for cosmetics.

No account linking. I originally played this on Xbox Gamepass and would have loved to keep my progression on the battle pass. I was having fun and did not want to pay for the Battle pass on the Xbox app knowing that my progression was then tied to the app. I bought Rematch Pro - equal to base + 1x Captain pass - to support the creators on Steam, but have lost ~20 hours of progression and all my customisation. Playing with friends who stayed on the Gamepass now means progressing two different accounts separately.

96,75 % der Tore sind genau solche. Es ist super langweilig und stale geworden.

Hab mich immer gefragt: Wieso bin ich so mies und schieße so wenig Tore?

Leí opiniones sobre la beta y creo que, si bien el modelo de negocio que usaron puede ser cuestionable (me recuerda bastante al que usó The Finals en su momento), es un juego de fútbol muy fresco y divertido.

Se necesitan skills para jugarlo bien y paciencia para adaptarse a todos los controles: ataque, defensa y portería.
Jugar con mando se siente un poco más lento; no creo que la sensibilidad esté bien optimizada para la cámara, pero fuera de eso, juegues con teclado o mando, lo vas a disfrutar. Es cuestión de adaptación.

El máximo provecho se le saca con amigos.
Una party de 5 es la mejor forma de plantarle cara al contrario: comunicarse, defender en bloque y saber cuándo (o no) pasar el balón es fundamental, sobre todo en el 5v5.
Eso no quiere decir que este modo —o los otros— no sean disfrutables con randoms... pero se complica bastante, ya que, a decir verdad, hay gente a la que le rebota un gargajo.

Recomiendo mucho que los nuevos jugadores empiecen con el 3v3 o el 4v4.
Es mucho más ordenado, el campo tiene más espacios y así es más fácil familiarizarse con cada aspecto del juego.

Don't let the negative reviews steer you away from an amazing game with an obvious dev team that cares and listens. The game rewards thinking and skillfull plays like real Football does. Most the people complaining about people not passing fail to realize the game has attracted a new genre of football fans who will quickly and surely learn the fundamentals of the sport just like how we all did when we first got into it just like them. It's only been a week, and everyday the game get's better and more challenging. Just buy the game with good faith knowing it can only get better from here.

Honestly, I wish I could leave a neutral review because the game has a lot of potential but it's clear that it needs a lot more development time to the point that I think it should be marketed as an early access game. 

Positives
Great gameplay, matches are short and reward both individual and team skill. 

The atmosphere is unique and well done, it has  a futuristic urban street sports vibe that makes it stand out and looks awesome. 

Once you spend some time grappling with the controls it really becomes an elegant tool for you to express yourself. 

Negatives
Like I said, the game feels like it's in early access and missing a ton of features that are quite frankly baffling considering this is a competitive multiplayer game in 2025 that has had multiple betas. 

Examples:

No ability to rematch opponents
No cross play
Super bare bones training room with no ability to set up drills or modify anything
The prologue training is incredibly shallow and finishing it doesn't prepare you at all for even the most casual matches
Can't even review or watch replays of previous matches 
No key binding 
No interesting gameplay modifiers even for private lobbies
The battle pass system has 0 explanation as to how it works and I legit was confused as to how to progress and what I unlocked.
Rank is beyond unfinished, they don't even have deranking and it's exclusive 5v5
Can't report disruptive teammates or commend good ones
Server performance is really inconsistent and makes defending a crapshoot at times 

Some suggestions:

Game definitely needs a better tutorial and I would love a gamepad viewer or hotkeys appearing on the screen like Nintendo did in Breath of the Wild to keep track of all your moves. 

I also think 3v3 is terrible for newbies because when you are learning you are really dragging your team down. I prefer 4v4 because it's easier to make mistakes and the court is a lot less hectic because people are spread out more and think that should be the default for people still learning.

Despite all the negatives I'm still mostly ok recommending it because the foundation for a really fun game is there but everything else is very basic or unfinished.

I hope to be able to update my review down the line because it's a really cool game but there's a long way to go before I can wholeheartedly tell people to pick it up.

Premièrement le jeu est joli bien que pas non plus transcendant, mais comparé à d'autres jeux de ces dernières années c'est justifié car le jeux tourne fluidement sur le pc d'un ami avec une 1050ti ryzen 5 2600 et de la ram bas de gamme.
le gameplay est incroyable tant au niveau des sensations de tir de passes ect que de sa complexité car même si tu vois toute les possibilités d'action vites les exécutés est compliqué ce qui rend satisfaisant de réussir les actions voulus. 
En plus la pas de méta pas de cartes qui donnent 10% de puissance de tir contre 10% de vitesse tout le monde à les mêmes armes c'est le skill et l'entrainement qui fais gagner les joueurs pas le jeux.
Après tout sa on s'attend à quelques point négatifs mais honnêtement appart les rares bug ya pas grand choses appart peut être que le jeux est des fois peux lisibles mais on si habitue.

This game is so flawed but it's absolute worst feature is the playerbase. The game would be a lot more fun if passing happened more, but single queueing is just a nightmare. There is such a high chance that you will just get a player in your lobby who will never pass, they will try and dribble 20 times past a player lose the ball and repeat. Then they will do the same as goalie and get scored on but in the end they are happy because they don't have to be in goal because it switches. There are fun things in this game you just will not experience most of them if you play alone.

En el estado actual del juego, me es imposible recomendarlo.

Sí, el juego es divertido y tenía todo el potencial, pero entre el pésimo estado del juego y buena parte de la comunidad hacen que la experiencia sea toda la contraria.
Por parte del juego en sí, los problemas se podrían resumir en los siguientes puntos:

[b]Rendimiento:[/b] Durante las partidas, el crasheo y desconexión de compañeros y rivales es una constante. No puedes jugar 2 partidos seguidos sin que ocurra, es inevitable. He llegado a perder varias partidas porque al portero le crashee o le expulse con el balón cogido dentro de portería o cerca de ella, incluso he visto a porteros tirarse a parar un balón y desaparecer en el aire, un despropósito absoluto.

[b]Bugs en partida:[/b] El juego es terriblemente inconsistente en sus mecánicas y muchas veces es imposible predecir que ocurrirá en determinadas circunstancias. Si haces una entrada a un jugador con balón y le das, puedes o bien atravesarlo a él y el balón, hacer que se trastabille o bien que caiga al suelo, resultando inútil tirarse si sucede una de las dos primeras. Si el rival decide hacer un regate mientras le haces la entrada, o bien se convierten en fantasmas y se van de ti, o bien la entrada es efectiva y la robas. Esto hace que el meta consista en cubrir el pase o esperar a que el rival la pierda, porque si haces una entrada es como tirar una moneda al aire. Esta aleatoriedad se aplica también a balones divididos, donde aunque tengas mejor posición que el rival y lo tengas detrás, puede llevarse el balón sin ningún tipo de problemas. 
Esto también afecta aunque en menor medida al portero, donde por el desync tu veras que paras el balón pero luego te atraviesa y entra como si nada.
Ya mejor ni entro en el tema de algunas "mecánicas" en las que literalmente puedes volar en el aire con el balón.

[b]Competitivo:[/b] En esta no hay mucho que profundizar, el modo "ranked" no es un modo competitivo. No tiene matchmaking con gente de tu rango, así de simple. Siendo platino te puede unir a un plata división 3 durante varias partidas seguidas sin problema. Esto se debe a que el sistema de MMR no existe y que cuando ganas siempre vas a obtener 20 puntos y cuando pierdes siempre te quitan 18, sin tener en cuenta con quien juegas ni contra quienes. Además, cuando subes de rango, es imposible bajar por mucho que pierdas. Por ejemplo, si tienes un compañero que te saca 1 victoria de diferencia y el sube al rango siguiente y tu no y posteriormente empezáis a perder partidas, él seguirá exactamente en el mismo rango mientras que tu bajarás cuesta abajo sin frenos. Esto es un problema bastante gordo, ya que cualquier recién ascendido podrá trollear partidas sin ningún tipo de repercusión.

[b]Comunidad:[/b] Esto, aunque no sea un problema directo del juego, afecta bastante a la experiencia del jugador por lo que creo que es digno de mencionar si piensas comprar el juego. Hay partidos en los que te toca gente que intenta jugar en equipo y ahí es cuando el juego brilla muchísimo, pero luego hay partidos en los que no jugarás directamente, y la proporción estimada es, siendo benevolente, quizá 1 de cada 10 partidas donde el equipo querrá jugar bien. Las otras 9 de cada 10 serán partidas en las que nadie bajará a defender, no la pasarán ni una sola vez, no cubrirán a otros jugadores y se quedarán AFK arriba pidiendo balón y flameando por chat rápido o de voz si no se la pasas. Notarás bastante las premades cuando estas solo en una banda y el portero en lugar de jugar contigo pegará pelotazo a su colega cubierto por 2 rivales y la perderá. Es por esto por lo que, si consigues una premade de 5 vas a disfrutar el juego como un niño pequeño, pero si tu idea es comprarlo y jugar sólo olvídate.
El juego no tiene ningún sistema de report de jugadores, por lo que entre la protección del rango y la ausencia de baneos no favorecen nada al estado de la comunidad que ya de por sí es bastante mala actualmente

✅ Puntos altos

[*]Buena jugabilidad y adictiva
El control de los jugadores es muy satisfactorio: los movimientos responden con precisión, los disparos están bien ajustados, y los pases son una mezcla entre ágil y calculado. La dinámica de porteros intercambiables también añade profundidad estratégica.

[*]Intensa experiencia multijugador
La acción 5 v 5 —también disponible en 3 v 3 y 4 v 4— es rápida, frenética y táctica. Cada partido puede decidirse en prórroga o por la regla de “mercy” si hay goleada.

[*]Estilo visual fresco y futurista
El diseño artístico mezcla estética optimista con un personaje personalizable (género, cuerpo, prótesis), en un entorno que recuerda a un futuro sostenible de 2065.

[*]Gran potencial competitivo
La comunidad está entusiasmada, y muchos lo comparan con Rocket League: tiene lo necesario para triunfar si se solucionan ciertos problemas iniciales.

⚠️ Áreas de mejora

[*]Problemas técnicos notables
Hay desconexiones, retrasos y fallos, especialmente durante el lanzamiento. No se detectan bien las resoluciones, incluso en PC.

[*]Sin crossplay (de momento)
Aunque estaba previsto, el lanzamiento no incluye juego multiplataforma. Prometen implementarlo más adelante.

[*]Contenido limitado y progreso lento
La personalización actual es básica, y la tienda/battle pass ofrece pocas recompensas, lo que puede restarle motivación a quienes buscan variedad.

[*]Falta un modo offline
El juego es totalmente online. No hay modo de práctica con bots o campaña para un jugador, lo que lo hace menos accesible para quienes quieren entrenar o jugar solos.

Je ne conseille pas du tout le jeu. Au début, je pensais que ça pourrait changer avec le temps, mais c’est tout l’inverse. À la sortie, on avait des crashs ; maintenant, on a des bugs qui font que tu ne peux plus toucher la balle, des Desync qui te font croire que tu l’as alors qu’en fait non… Sympa quand tu es au but et que tu penses arrêter un tir, puis non ! Pratique dans un jeu de foot… Depuis la première grosse mise à jour, c’est même devenu infernal : la balle se téléporte, certains gardiens semblent avoir des aimants dans les mains tandis que d’autres la voient passer à travers eux.

Les ranked, initialement uniquement en 5v5, passent enfin en 3v3 et 4v4 ( enfin normalement ), ce qui aurait dû être là dès le départ. La communication des devs est inexistante : un seul message après la sortie pour annoncer qu’il n’y aura rien de fou avant fin août, soit deux mois après le lancement. Donc en gros, des problèmes qui n’auraient même pas dû passer le contrôle qualité ne sont toujours pas réglés.

Ajoutez à cela les pseudo Ronaldinho du quartier qui jouent solo, ratent tout, mais spamment le « Good job » quand quelqu’un loupe une action. Il manque aussi un système pour garder un gardien fixe : si on en a un bon, il est obligé de changer de rôle à cause de la rotation, ce qui fait perdre temps et terrain. Et un systeme de report pour les rageux qui marque dans leur camp ou pire qui aide l'équipe d'en face... Le tout en ranked tant qu'a faire.

Et pendant que les bugs et Desync s’aggravent, la boutique reste toujours aussi agressive, avec packs à 10 €, Season Pass, éditions à presque 50 €, alors que le jeu ne fonctionne pas correctement et que les bugs majeurs ne sont même pas corrigés.

Bref : une honte. Garder votre argent pour un jeu qui en vaut la peine et passer votre chemin. Ce jeu mérite de sombrer ( et les avis récents le prouvent )

Sauf que, spoiler alert : vous vous faites dribbler H24 parce que tout le monde sait déjà comment vous jouez. Vous êtes pareils pour la plupart.
Sans compter que vous ne connaissez même pas la touche pour faire des passes, ce qui rendrait le jeu plus fluide et plus beau à voir.
Mais non, parce que “je suis Bachira”.
Bah niquez-vous, bande de glands.
Si vous pensez comme ça, vous n’avez rien compris au football. Ça s’appelle un sport collectif, c’est pas pour rien, bande de losers.


The game is great, except for the idiots who refuse to play as goalkeeper because “being a keeper isn’t like in Blue Lock and you can’t show off your dribbling skills.”
Spoiler alert: you’re getting dribbled past 24/7 because everyone already knows how you play — you’re basically all the same.
On top of that, most of you don’t even know the pass button, which would actually make the game smoother and way more enjoyable to watch.
But no, because “I’m Bachira.”
Well, screw you. If that’s how you think, you clearly understand nothing about football.
It’s called a team sport for a reason, you bunch of losers.

[h1] I Can Confidently Say This Game Fills The Black Void In Me, *BUT* [/h1]

First off, very easily I can say this game has very addicting and fun mechanics even if the passing mechanic can be wonky, which makes many players not pass at all and instead try to solo 5 defenders, but other than that, there definitely is many players who are sensible enough for teamplay, just that its not gonna be ideal no matter what rank you are. 

Secondly, there is major lag and desyncing issues. This game is definitely more like an early access release 80% done so far. It wouldn't hurt to add specific server selection rather than server region selection (As in, if my connection to sloclap eu server 1 is 30ms and sloclap eu server 2 is 80ms, I should be able to choose specifically to play in the better server).

Not much else to say, foundation and gameplay is 9.9/10

[h1] Vigariouz Rematch Review [/h1]

[h2] A Surprisingly Fun and Promising Football Game [/h2]

[h3] I’ve never been a big fan of football games. Titles like FIFA never really clicked with me, either because of their overcomplicated mechanics or unfun positions. But Rematch genuinely surprised me. [/h3]

It strikes a great balance between scoring goals, defending, and even goalkeeping. To my surprise, playing as a goalkeeper is actually fun in this game. There’s a satisfying flow to the gameplay, and the more you play, the more you understand and improve.

The mechanics are solid, with plenty of potential for future updates. Much like Rocket League, it feels like a game that will get better over time as the developers fine-tune the experience and expand on what’s already working.

Currently, I’m ranked Platinum, and at least from Gold to Platinum, the ranked system feels fair. You generally need to win 2 out of 3 matches to move up, which is a nice touch. There are still players who seem out of place in the rankings, but that should balance out as more people play.

I’d love to see clubs added to the game, as well as real-world gear like jerseys and merch. Custom ball skins would also be a cool touch, especially if they included official designs from major leagues. There are already some nice +effort cosmetics like the purple and blue effects, and expanding on that would be awesome.

Adding more competitive modes would also be a great step forward. A 3v3 mode could offer more dynamic gameplay, while a dedicated 2v2 or "Duos" mode with one player as a goalkeeper and the other attacking would bring a unique twist. It would almost feel like a 1v1 with an extra layer of coordination, which sounds both strategic and fun.

Overall, Rematch is a fun, fresh take on the football genre and I’m excited to see where it goes next.

Знаете, REMATCH — это как если бы FIFA и Rocket League снюхались на заднем дворе и родили бодрую, весёлую аркадку. Управляется кайфово, матчи бодрые, а моменты бывают такие, что аж адреналин в уши стучит. Казалось бы — играй и кайфуй.

Но не тут-то было.

Каждый матч — это лотерея, где главный приз: твой тиммейт, 14-летний гений с завышенным ЧСВ и нулевым желанием играть в пас. Он будет пытаться в одиночку прорваться через всё поле, игнорировать партнёров и орать в голосовой, если его "гениальный" план не сработал. И ты стоишь такой на воротах, как последний герой в хаосе, молишься, чтобы он хотя бы один раз отдал пас. Спойлер: не отдаст.

И самое печальное — ты не можешь кинуть репорт на токсика. Даже если он только что назвал твою маму «ботом с ограниченным ИИ». Почему? Кто знает. Наверное, потому что в этом цифровом аду токсичность — это фича, а не баг.

В общем, игра — пушка, комьюнити — помойка. Залетаешь за фановым матчем, а выходишь с нервным тиком и вопросом: "А я точно взрослый человек, а не школьник на перемене?"

7 голов из 10. Дайте кнопку "репорт", пожалуйста. И антидепрессанты.
