The intro + a couple of hours playtime can give the player a basic understanding and the muscle memory for a few main actions which allow an enjoyable first time experience. 
Then, it's about internalizing team play tactics and several tricks that help you get in depth with this game.

This game shines when it comes to learning while playing matches! Downtimes are short after matches have ended or a goal has been scored, so players are put back into action quickly. The control scheme is 

Having played a session with both a controller and mouse&keyboard, I feel with mouse&keyboard I have easier time aiming shots and adjusting camera quickly to see behind <-> in front. This seems like an advantage to me, but I'm very much a newbie here.

Long-term monetization of this game seems to be focusing on cosmetics. Going forward, I hope that all players have the possibility to get the cosmetics they see as interesting and/or fit for their character/personality, and not only players who spend extra money on it. Currently the Season Pass locks all sorts of nice-to-have cosmetic rewards behind 10€ wall per Season, which I'm guessing is ~90days.

There's an in-game currency for buying some cosmetics that doesn't seem too hard to obtain through matches compared to the prices of what's being sold. Fingers crossed it stays that way. 

So, at launch, a good game for 25€.

Je joue au jeu depuis les premières bêtas, j’ai même participé aux tests techniques dans les locaux de la boîte, donc j’ai accumulé pas mal d’heures de jeu.

Le jeu est excellent, mais il reste encore beaucoup trop de bugs qui cassent l’expérience à certains moments des textes non mis à jour ou encore en anglais, et même une date indiquée au 23 août 2023.

Pour moi, il s’agit encore d’une bêta à l’heure actuelle, et non d’un jeu finalisé dans son entièreté.

En ranked, à la fin des matchs, le scoreboard ne permet pas de savoir si l’on joue avec des joueurs diamant, gold, etc., ce qui rend difficile l’analyse des parties.

Avec un ami, on a lancé Rematch en même temps et fait nos matchs de classement simultanément. J’avais plus d’heures de jeu que la moyenne, donc plus de chances d’être MVP à chaque match, et malgré ça, mon pote a obtenu un meilleur ELO que moi, alors que ses stats (passes, buts) étaient inférieures. Comment expliquer qu’il ait fini avec deux divisions de plus ? (Je dis ça sans ego, mais simplement par incompréhension du système d’ELO du jeu.)

Pour finir, le jeu est vraiment bon, mais vu son prix, on a l’impression d’être encore sur une bêta, avec de nombreuses lacunes, notamment au niveau des menus. Par exemple, lorsque modifie son personnage, les changements ne s’appliquent que deux parties plus tard du jamais vu.

Malgré tous ces défauts et bugs, le jeu reste globalement très agréable.

Now with an additional 79+ hours in-game since my prior review, I felt the need to ameliorate it. At the time of writing this review, i've reached the Platinum One rank, by no means the most prestigious, but 4th in an apparently 6 title long hierarchy. At this point, near the zenith of calculable rematch skill, you would assume something would align or reveal itself to me. Yet the only true consistent factor of this game is its tendency to restrict its own players. Now you could be throwing your arms up, calling me a "blue lock" fan or something, first of all, that ♥♥♥♥ sucks, second of all, it doesn't matter how you play this game, you could be playing like Inter Milan or imitating Shaolin ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ Soccer, and still you'd be swindled out of any tangible progress or feedback by either the endless lag this game seems to generate just offhandedly in the midst of online matches, or the camera and movement that are married together in the effort to make playing this game the most unresponsive inhibiting ♥♥♥♥ ever. There is no "turning" in Rematch, your synthetic human avatar is only capable of moving forward while already in pursuit of any given objective, and any attempts to steer or turn them without the space for a proper 180, (In which you will already be out of stamina) the human stand-in will throw all momentum to the side, drifting like a car and throwing off your aim, positioning, and legitimately anything else you could consider vital to the play at the time. Now if you're the strawman i've created for this scenario you're saying "But my realism." hey man, the main way of scoring in this game is kicking the ball off the interior wall of some sort of permanently vacillating digital stadium that erases and adds crowds, dragons, and commonly replicates weather or cosmic phenomena along with constantly encapsulates the player stand-ins, we never see a life for these things outside of the Rematch Stadium, their highly customizable appearance and robotic movements combined with the clearly futuristic setting infers to me they are androids built to play a rough approximation of what they understand as "Soccer." Any other explanation for this game is inexcusable in my mind. Did I mention there's a ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ mini-map? Im serious, this game has a mini-map you need to ping with your eyes like the sonar of a submarine while controlling your guy and moving the camera around to get the accurate positions of enemies and teammates. 

TLDR; ♥♥♥♥ you

ゲーム性が圧倒的に面白く、プレイしていて本当に熱中できます。最近はランクのマッチングの遅さも改善され、快適になったのは嬉しいポイントです。

ただし、いくつか気になる点もあります。まず、ソフトの価格が高めで、現時点では高いエディションの6,000円の価値は感じにくく、通常版で十分だと思います。

また、チーター（加速チート）の出現や、固定チャットのオフ機能がなく荒らしチャットがずっと流れる点、通報機能がSteam経由で分かりにくい点が気になります。

バトルパスでもらえる服の模様にバリエーションが少なく、靴下と靴がホーム・アウェイで個別に設定できない、キャラクタークリエイトの種類が少ない、ゲームが落ちやすい、バグ技（浮遊）があるなど、細かい「気が利かない」と感じる部分も多いです。

それでも、こうした短所を凌駕するほどの面白さがあるため、個人的には満点評価です。ただし、プレイに直接影響するバグやチートについては、今後できるだけ早く対処してほしいと思います。

人がいなくなったら終わり。

Rezension zu Rematch – Fairness? Fehlanzeige!

Rematch hat eigentlich viel Potenzial: schnelle Matches, spannende Duelle und ein gutes Spielgefühl. Leider wird dieses Potenzial viel zu oft von toxischem Verhalten einzelner Spieler zerstört. Besonders störend ist dabei das absichtliche Schießen von Eigentoren sowie das frühzeitige Verlassen (Leaven) von Matches.

Es ist absolut frustrierend, wenn Mitspieler das Spiel sabotieren – sei es durch Eigentore oder weil sie einfach mitten im Match aussteigen. Solches Verhalten zerstört den Spielfluss und raubt allen anderen den Spielspaß. Dass das Spiel keine Strafen für solche Aktionen verhängt, ist für mich unverständlich.

Mein Appell an die Entwickler:
Wenn ihr wollt, dass Rematch langfristig Spieler bindet, braucht es dringend ein gerechtes Strafsystem – z. B. Matchsperren oder Punkteabzug – für absichtliche Eigentore und das Leaven. Andernfalls wird das Spiel zunehmend von Trollen dominiert, was die Community spalten und die Motivation vieler Spieler zerstören wird.

Fazit:
Ein gutes Spiel mit gravierenden Lücken im Fairplay-System. Ohne klare Regeln und Strafen für Spielverderber ist der Spielspaß leider nur von kurzer Dauer

サッカー版『ロケットリーグ』とも称される本作『Rematch』ですが、インゲームのプレイ体験の完成度は非常に高いです。

パスやシュートが決まったときの爽快感は抜群で、試合のテンポも良く、止まることなく最後まで駆け抜けることが出来ます。
また、選手1人を操作するというシステムも、プレイヤーの没入感を高めており、操作していて気持ちの良いゲーム体験が得られます。

一方で、インゲーム以外の要素には多くの課題があると考えます。

・マッチングやゲーム内挙動のバグが多い（マッチは修正済み?）
・バトルパスの購入システムや進行の説明がない
・キャラクリエイトやユニフォーム関連の試着ができない
・ソックスやシューズの色変更がメイン/サブユニフォームで別に設定出来ない
・プロフィールカードの編集が可能だが、他人のカードを見る機能がない
・試合のキャリア情報が確認できない
・マッチングしたプレイヤーのランク帯が不明
・キーコンフィグ未対応

不満点はざっと挙げただけでもかなりの数になります。
それでもなお、インゲーム中の楽しさがすべてを帳消しにしてしまうほどの魅力がある、ある意味“恐ろしい”ゲームです。
今後のアップデートで周辺機能が改善されれば、さらに多くのプレイヤーに支持されるタイトルになる可能性を秘めていると思っています。

It's early, but I'm dropping this here now until it gets fixed.

Pros:
- Fast paced and good background design
- Easy to match with friends in online play

Cons:
- It's inconsistent as ♥♥♥♥ when it comes to challenges or just even getting the ball in your possession. In some cases, you win a challenge where you're clearly behind the opposing player. In others, you get tackled from behind with a guy that boosts through a slide from 10 feet out
- Ball possession is on and off. Your player will touch the ball and the ball refuses to get in your possession, but you'll see the opposing team benefit from just that.
- Connection can get spotty. Multiple times myself or other players are disconnected because the client crashes in the middle of the game. Because you drop and if your team doesn't win without you, you're losing out on MMR in ranked because there's no fail safe to say "hey man, our client ♥♥♥♥♥♥ up so we won't penalize you."
- Reporting players. Toxicity is a given with any game that has PVP but the fact that you have a ranked option and don't allow for reporting players that are just sitting without actually playing is wild to me.

Save your money and sit on this one. It ain't it right now.

Like Rocket League with people instead of cars, Rematch is chaotic, competitive, and has a clear vision that deserves time to grow.

Sloclap’s first multiplayer effort may be slightly undercooked, but its core gameplay is undeniably engaging — and its foundation is rock solid. Yes, it could have used a little more time in the oven, and there are a few missing ingredients (cough, cough, crossplay), which may prove detrimental at launch. Ultimately though, I don't think these omissions will hurt in the long run. If the player base holds and the updates keep coming, Rematch is clearly built to last.

Bugs, crashes and some UI quirks are present — and of course, when you buy a game, you expect it to work. The issues in question have amounted to balls getting stuck or becoming unplayable, crashes mid-match, and a clunky menu interface. Thankfully, all these things seem fixable over time. More importantly, the thrill of the moment-to-moment gameplay consistently outweighed the impact these issues had on my experience. It's just so gosh darn fun to play.

Rematch is simple to learn but hard to master — both rewarding, and frustrating in the best ways. There's a predictive layer to every approach, every encounter. Reading your opponent correctly can completely shift the momentum of a match. Every on-field skirmish feels like its own mini-game, and winning these battles for possession can be as rewarding, if not more so, than scoring a goal. Drawing defenders in, only to lob a pass over their heads, or patiently outlasting an aggressive tackler — these are the moments that create space, that lead to goals. In Rematch teamwork, positioning, and possession are everything. There's no room for a one man army out there. Rainbow kicks will only get you so far.

The Keeper/sweeper position is arguably the most important on the field — and definitely my favourite. I’ve always loved goalkeeping in any sport. There's something about being that last line of defence, with a singular mission: don't let anything past. It's high-stakes, high-reward — and Rematch captures that beautifully. Making a clutch save at a pivotal moment is incredibly satisfying. One-on-one situations come down to pure guesswork, who flinches first? Damn, it's stressful — and I love it.

Communication is key. Calling for passes, or using the games built in quick-chat system — like giving a "we've got this" after conceding a goal — all works well. But in my opinion nothing beats voice chat with friends. I've had some great matches with randoms, but when I’m communicating in real-time with someone I know, the experience feels tighter, more connected. Match structure is simple and effective: 3v3, 4v4, 5v5, and ranked 5v5. Games are six minutes long, with unlimited extra time in case of a tie. Practice mode could use some polish, but it gets the job done.

At its core, Rematch has a unique vision. Yes, it’s soccer — but with less. Less field, fewer players, fewer rules — yet somehow it’s more dynamic, more demanding, more beautiful. It's the sport distilled down to its purest, most essential form. Even if my obsession starts to simmer, I'll be back — for the updates, and because it feels like the devs actually care what we think. Sloclap has given themselves an early lead — and the pressure’s on to hold the line.

"Rematch" isn't just a game—it's a battle of wits that pulls you in from the very first move. From its sleek design to its brilliantly balanced gameplay mechanics, this title has earned its place among the best modern strategy games.

At its core, "Rematch" thrives on simplicity with depth. The rules are easy to grasp, making it accessible for newcomers, but the layers of strategy and counterplay keep even seasoned players coming back for more. Every session feels like a fresh challenge, as the game’s dynamics shift subtly with each opponent and playstyle.

One of the most impressive aspects of "Rematch" is how it turns failure into fuel. Losing a round doesn’t feel frustrating—it feels motivating. The built-in "rematch" system cleverly encourages players to adapt, learn, and come back stronger, making victory all the more satisfying.

Visually, the game is crisp and modern, with a clean interface and intuitive controls that never get in the way of the experience. Whether you're playing casually or diving into a competitive streak, "Rematch" nails the balance between fun and challenge.

In a crowded market of fast-burn games, "Rematch" stands out for its long-term appeal. It’s the kind of game that you think about even after you’ve put it down—replaying turns in your head, planning your next comeback. And when that rematch opportunity comes? You’re ready.

Verdict: 9.5/10 – A thrilling, addictive, and intelligent game that deserves every comeback.

고의 자살골에 대한 패널티가 전혀 없고, 랭크 조차도 랭크에 맞는 밸런스가 잡히지 않음
배치는 고의트롤에 실버구간이 잡혔음, 그러려니 하며 계속 랭크를 이어나감.
하지만 매칭되는 유저들은 조작법조차 익히지 못한듯한 유저들 혹은
그와는 상반되는 유저들이 한번에 매칭되어 실력 격차가 너무나게됨
n시간 동안 랭크를 돌려본 결과 매칭에 랭크는 아무런 영향이 없는 듯 함.

 아직 버그가 은근히 많고, 그중에는 공을 잡을 수 없는(개인기, 태클 불가능) 버그까지 있으며 한 번은 공이 경기장에서 사라져버린 적도 있다.

점수에 대한 단점으로는, 매번 MVP를 먹거나 지더라도 점수는 1-2등을 차지하는 보람이 없음.
랭크전에 오면 그나마 패스 플레이도 가능하지만 일부 다인큐의 고의 트롤링은 도저히 막을 수 없었음.

게임 내 차단 기능을 생성 혹은 활성화, 랭크 내 플레이점수에 따른 차등 득실제 등을 적용시켜줬으면 하는게 간절함.

정말 재밌게 플레이하고있고 진심으로 게임을 즐기려고 하는 플레이어들도 분명히 많음
서버 지역이 넒어 외국인들 매칭이 많이 잡혀서 외국어(영어, 중국어, 일본어 등) 공부가능함
실제로 플레이 하면서 실력, 매너 좋은 외국인 게임 메이트도 여럿 생겼고, 올해 플레이 한 게임 중 최고라고 말할 수 있지만 유쾌하지 않은 경험이 종종 있어서 아쉬움.

이 게임을 시작하려는 사람들에게 간절히 바라는 것은 많지 않음.
자살골, 팀원에게 고의 태클 등의 비매너 플레이 혹은 트롤링은 지양해주었으면하고,
랭크를 돌리고 싶다면 최소한 일반게임으로 5:5 매칭을 n시간 정도 돌려서 적응이 된 후에
폐를 끼치지 않을 정도의 연계가 되는 수준에서 랭크 게임을 돌렸으면 하는 바람이 있음.

Eu queria muito dar uma nota boa para esse jogo, ele tem uma ideia criativa e viciante, porém está mal acabado. Crashs constantes no momento em que se faz gol ou você não conseguir mexer no jogo após dar AltTab. Conquistas que não funcionam ou contam mal as coisas que você faz dentro do jogo. Personagens travando sendo que a internet está boa. As vezes você começa o jogo no modo câmera ou fica a HUD do modo câmera a partida inteira no canto da tela. O jogo também tem muitas coisas faltando simples em um jogo multiplayer assim. Um simples botão de reportar, pois o tanto de gente racista que você acha no jogo... A customização é bem limitada também. A ideia do jogo é boa, mas o jogo claramente não está finalizado o suficiente para o lançamento. Talvez eu mudarei minha review para positiva após esses problemas serem resolvidos, mas até lá, vou ter que deixar assim. - Edição: acho que resolveu

I had fun in the beta — the gameplay’s smooth and matches feel hype when things click. Honestly impressed they pulled off decent online for a soccer game like this.

But for a $30 game? It feels way too barebones. No real single-player career mode (prologue teased it but it was just a tutorial), no offline modes to chill with, and barely any customization — couldn’t even change my haircut at launch.

And then on top of that, there’s a season pass? From the same devs who made Sifu, I expected way more.

It’s fun, but this should’ve been free-to-play with optional extras, not a full-price game that still tries to monetize like one.

요악 하면 프리스타일 풋볼 & 리얼 싸커 혼종 or 아이오 싸커 상위 버전임. 

입문 때, 키보드 마우스로 플레이 한다 하면 보는 각이나 이런 건 빠르게 보고 판단 할 수 있지만 패스 삑이 나는 경우가 많음. (이 때는 그냥 패스 키 (마우스 우클릭) 를 먼저 누르고, 마우스를 밀면 삑 잘 안 나는 거 같음.) 패스 삑이 많아서 패드로 하는 경우가 있는데 패드로 하게 되면 패스 삑은 적지만, 보고 플레이 하는 거랑 슈팅이 좀 힘들긴 할 듯? (개인적인 생각, 패드 적응했거나 한 유저들은 금방 따라갈 지도 모르겠음.)

그 후에 적응이 되야 재미 있는거지, 적응 못하면 솔직히 힘듬. (난 적응해서 재미있게 하고 있음)

5명이 만났을 때 한 명은 쓰레기가 있다는 말이 맞을 정도로 패스가 없음. 패스 주는 게 어렵다 느껴져서 그런 거 같다라는 부분도 어느정도 동의는 한다만, 적응 하고 나면 괜찮다고 생각함. 

특히나 소통이 되야 좀 패스가 주고 받아져서 하게 되는 거면 한국 서버 와서 한국인들끼리 티어 올리는 게 베스트인 거 같긴함. 

추가로 지금 호나우지뉴 번들 상점에서 11000원에 팔고 있는데 나중에 다른 축구 선수 번들 가격들도 이정도로 낸다면,  많이들 사지 않을까 싶음. (개인적인 생각) 

결론 = 적응해야 재미있다. 솔랭, 빠대는 외국인들이 많아서 많이 답답하다. 할 거면 한국 서버 와서 사람 구해서 해라.

Me gustaría poder recomendar este juego. Ya que la jugabilidad es muy buena y es genuinamente un juego muy divertido. Sin embargo no puedo dejar un buen review hasta que arreglen la horrible cantidad de lag en los servidores de america del sur. Siempre que juego una partida, me mete en un servidor donde llego a tener de ping 160ms o hasta 300ms, lo que vuelve al juego totalmente injugable, si eres de sudamerica NO COMPRES ESTE JUEGO hasta que arreglen los servidores y el servicio para la región.

NO COMPRARRR
Actualmente: injugable para latinoamerica, nose como sera en otras regiones, pero todas las partidas a 160ms o 300ms cuando en las betas se podia jugar a 60ms tranquilamente, es una lastima que a 8 dias de su lanzamiento con acceso anticipado no hayan arreglado este problema

Hasta que no arreglen esto la verdad que no le recomiendo a nadie a comprar este juego, lamentable y una lastima

有《师父》打底的工作室，把行云流水的动作运用在了体育竞技上。这个足球游戏更加现代化，更加快节奏，没有边界概念，而是改为碰壁反弹。极大增加了整体流畅性。又没有夸张的巨大球体的那种搞笑风格，本质还是遵循传统足球魅力核心玩法。非常大量的增加了各种动作，需要的操作和操作组合不少，在教程阶段每个都很细致的教给了玩家。绿茵战场随机应变，除了体术还要用脑力战斗。比如其特色的故意碰壁反弹也是一种绝妙的配合。玩家可以化身门将。有中文字幕及配音，有成就，能+1。裸连不卡。

[h1] Rematch — неожиданно затянула! [/h1]

Хотя я не фанат футбола, игра реально зашла. Затянула с первых матчей: приятная, яркая картинка, бодрый и необычный геймплей. Визуал радует глаз, а сами матчи проходят с азартом, даже если ты не разбираешься в футбольной тактике.

Но есть и минусы. Оптимизация хромает: случаются резкие лаги и фризы — не всегда понятно, это сервер шалит или сама игра не тянет. Также расстраивает, что в рейтинговом режиме до сих пор нет системы наказаний для ливеров — обидно терять матч из-за чужого выхода.

В целом — классный проект с потенциалом. Надеюсь, разработчики подправят технические моменты и добавят больше поддержки честной игры.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[h1] Rematch — surprisingly fun! [/h1]

Even though I’m not a football fan, I really got hooked. The game pulled me in with its vibrant visuals and unique, engaging gameplay. It’s fast-paced, colorful, and enjoyable even if you have zero interest in football strategies.

That said, there are some drawbacks. The performance can be choppy — random FPS drops and stuttering happen, and it’s unclear whether it’s server-related or just poor optimization. Also, there’s no punishment for players who leave ranked matches, which can be very frustrating.

Overall, a promising and fun game. I hope the devs fix the tech issues and add better support for fair play.

JOGAÇO!!
Era exatamente o que eu estava procurando. Já estava de saco cheio desses freestyle football chineses feitos só pra farmar dinheiro. Finalmente saiu um jogo realmente bom, divertido e competitivo!

Pontos negativos:

A criação de personagem é bem ruim. Esse negócio de “tipo de corpo” é simplesmente ridículo. Se você for tentar fazer uma mulher, com certeza vai parecer uma pessoa trans ou não-binária, porque não existe uma modelagem feminina decente.

Alguns bugs persistem desde o beta, como passes bugados e a bola atravessando o goleiro. Mas, apesar disso, não chega a estragar a gameplay.

O que ainda falta no jogo:

Mapeamento de teclas pros controles.

Adicionar chat de texto e push-to-talk, porque esse sistema de microfone aberto é simplesmente péssimo.

Implementar sistema de comportamento, com elogios, reports e punições.

O jogo tem muito a melhorar, mas é extremamente promissor e, mesmo assim, já tá MUITO divertido de jogar!

Edit: Jogo se perdeu totalmente, lança mais skin do que concerta o jogo

This game is fantastic by far the best football game on the market. My review also includes the two beta tests i've played prior to the release of the full game. The positive things I have to say outweigh the negatives.
Positives:
- Very fluid controls once you get used to them the amount of freedom they give you is unparalleled compared to other sport games.
- Fast paced games don't feel like they drag on forever nor do they ever feel too short
- The skill ceiling in this game is very high on an individual level, however becomes even higher when you start working as a team.
- Playing as a team feels very rewarding and the dopamine you get after performing a combo goal is crazy
- Lots of character customization and it's only the beginning there will be a lot more once more seasons progress
- Impeccable sound design, I believe the ball sounds all to be very crisp and the sound you get when you hit a ball fully charged could tickle anyones brain. I think the music can be hit or miss but the impact and the sound of players and interactions with the ball make it amazing

Negatives:
- Currently a big one is ball desync i've ran into it a few times and becomes very hard to play the game if it occurs. out of 100 matches i've played about 10 of them i've experienced this.
- No crossplay currently so if you have a friend on another platform you are currently fresh out of luck if you want to play with them. The devs have stated they are working on this.
- Some teammates thinking they are him when they are in fact not. You run into quite a few ball hogs or ball chasers currently but I'm hoping that they'll lose enough games to learn.
- Goalie bugs, sometimes you'll grab a ball just for a person guarding you to smack it out of your hand glitching it into the net it's always frustrating.

Overall I believe this game holds a lot of enjoyment for players looking for a competitive football game. Keep in mind the team behind rematch is relatively small they have improved the game a lot imo since the first beta test. You gotta let them cook here they are on to a great game.
8/10

Jogo é bom mas não mudou praticamente nada depois da beta fechada, chegou somente a loja e alguns cosméticos novos essa parte ate entendo afinal o jogo é muito recente. Coisas que fizeram eu reembolsar rematch, partidas bugadas, joguei por 1 hr e vi bugs que estavam na beta e alguns novos. Um dos bugs que mais me incomoda e fez eu reembolsar foi simplesmente você entrar no meio de uma partida aleatória que já esta acontecendo, isso não tem nenhum sentido se for para recolocar players em partidas que alguém não conseguiu conectar é mais fácil cancelar a partida porque isso estraga completamente a experiencia, outro bug mais chato que esse foi simplesmente você entra na partida e seus controles simplesmente não funcionam e a partida fica rolando, mesmo você trocando do teclado pra controle simplesmente não funciona, você precisa forcar o jogo a fechar no gerenciador e abrir novamente para funcionar. Sobre o bug de entrar atrasado não sei como funciona mas notei que quando alguém kita outro player entra como se fosse um "reserva" eles precisam arrumar isso, afinal qual o sentido de você jogar uma partida de 5 minutos e entrar com ela faltando 2 minutos para acabar e seu time perdendo porque estava com menos um, fora o risco de você entrar e simplesmente o jogo não reconhecer seu teclado nem controle. Quem estiver lendo essa analise recomendo esperar para comprar o jogo se não vai acabar se frustrando com isso

Na tenhle ten žánr hry jsem se těšil roky, Avšak s rozsvícenými oči od nadšení musím prohlásit, že jsem hrozně zklamaný. Né že by byla hra nějak zvlášť hrozná, ale lidé co jí hrají. Je zřejmé, že drtivá většina hráčů nikdy v životě nehráli fotbal. natož aby chápali základní principy týmové hry s míčem. Hráči hrozně zmatkují a aby toho nebylo málo, těžce snáší prohru. Nebo, když jejích spoluhráč udělá chybu začnou spamovat hlasové zprávy "Nice Job¨ Ale co mě sere nejvíce je fakt že i přes to že daní jedinci dostanou zjebáno od týmu že jsou to totální budiž k ničemové, nemají absolutně žádnou sebereflexi a na místo se jít učit do quick matchů, okamžitě mačkají tlačítko ranked znova a znova, dokud všem co se snaží nezničí rank. Největší problém multiplayerových her už dávno nejsou nedostatečně zajímavé mechaniky, ale stále se zvětšující se počet nových hráčů díky stále více zvětšující se dostupnosti konzolí a PC za jakž takž přijatelné ceny na trhu ve srovnání s minulostí třeba před 10 lety. Zjednodušeně řečeno dneska může hrát kde jaký sopel, vidlák nebo dezolé. Další nepříjemná věc je těžká nevzdělanost hráčů, kteří neumí světový dorozumívací jazyk, řvou na vás rusky, francouzky, španělsky, a ještě nevím co, prostě totální cirkus zdegenerovaných jedinců. Zapomeňte na fotbal co má hlavu a patu, je to spíše o štěstí koho schytáte. A těžce nedoporučuji hrát hru ráno až do začátku odpoledne, hráči jsou totiž v tyto hodiny 3x více k ničemu. A není to REMATCH ale FOULMATCH.
Kdybych se tohle vše dozvěděl s předstihem nikdy si hru nezakoupím. Vyhozené peníze do koše.

Great game, but poor player base. Most of the players are selfish. They think they're good, proceed to lose the ball, and as soon as it is match point, they will proceed to steal the ball from teammates, be petty and score against you, thus losing the game for everyone. There is no report player button, no penalties, 0 repercussions for bad behavior on this game. Then you have "I don't do goalie" players, who will intentionally leave the goal and throw the game. It doesn't matter if you are ahead, in over time, or on match point to win, they will always leave and spam the "pass the ball" button. 

Now's let's talk about the terrible cues of the game. When you're goalie, despite getting the save and points, the ball will phase through you and count as a score. When you receive the ball on the blue circle, The ball will hit your chest, say you caught it and proceed to phase through you. When you don't even have the ball yet, the opposing player can tackle you and it will count as an interception. When you do the interception correctly, the ball is still in the opposing players possession as if they never got tackled, and to gaslight you, they still give you the interception points as the opposing player proceeds to dribble away with the ball. When you slide for a ball, the tippiest of toes will cause you roll over. but when you slide in front of the opposing player, the ball phases through you. As you go to stop a pass, the ball phases through your feet. 

This game will proceed to screw with you and gaslight you into thinking it's a skill issue, but its not. The games priority of ball possession, glitches, bugs, are what make some decent players bad and the 0 repercussions to petty and poor behavior is what makes the game unbearable because as soon as you miss a goalie save, you're surrounded by the "n" word, and barrage of other slurs and mockery. But don't worry you can mute them and repeat the same petty and poor team playing in silence in the next Rematch!

I am giving it a thumbs up for two reasons. One being that I love the idea of a rocket league and fifia fusion game and think there is a great opening in the market for it. Two being the artstyle is unique and cartoon like and matches the gameplay nicely. However, the game is very unpolished with lots of bugs and things to improve. There are problems with the animations, online features, servers seem very empty for a game with lots of online presence. There isnt a lot of content and the price point is definitely not justified (especially on top of battle pass. I see the innate potential of the game and look forward to seeing how it gets updated, just pray the devs lock in before they lose their playerbase.

O jogo é incrível, diversão garantida! Mas possui alguns problemas, como desconexões e, às vezes, simplesmente trava ou fecha do nada. Ainda assim, tudo bem — continua sendo um excelente jogo.

Mas existe algo pior do que isso. Assim como no CS e no COD onde temos os rushadores, aqui enfrentamos algo ainda mais irritante: alguns indivíduos, filhos de senhoras profissionais do prazer, acometidos por uma doença conhecida como Síndrome do Protagonista. Eles acham que são Pelé, CR7, Messi e Ronaldinho ao mesmo tempo, mas na verdade estão mais para Everaldo, do Fluminense.

Ficam meia hora dançando com a bola, cheios de dribles inúteis, mas não passam nem chutam para o gol. Um verdadeiro teste de paciência.

Tirando isso, eu recomendo o jogo! Vale a diversão.

Outro problema é o sistema de ranqueadas 1 pra 1: é necessário acumular 100 pontos para subir de elo em uma partida cansativa de 5 contra 5 — aparentemente, não tiveram tempo de programar os outros modos (3v3 ou 4v4). Você ganha apenas 20 pontos por vitória e perde entre 16 e 25 por derrota. É um sistema completamente desequilibrado e incoerente.

The game is really enjoyable. Good fundamentals, intuitive game-play, high skill ceiling. Cooperation is imperative, and the quick communication keys that are available help assist that core mechanic. 

However, there are a few bugs, as other comments state. Microphone enabling/disabling has issues, ping can adjust the ball placement, and sometimes your actions don't fully register for all players despite registering for you (ex: Hearing and seeing yourself save a goal, but then the game immediately proceeds as though it went in). Granted, those are usually pretty close call scenarios, but I did still believe I saved it initially. 

Should these bugs be adjusted, the game is impeccable. The battle pass is moderately priced (the game is not), cosmetics are compelling (though somewhat lacking), and the workshop modes allow you to train specific skills without being in a match, which I found quite helpful. Although, the lack of a quick restart for the workshop modes makes it tedious to keep trying to improve.

All in all, I thoroughly enjoy the game, and recommend it. In the long run, I'm sure it will be a fantastic competitive experience, as soon as the kinks are worked out. I might wait until it's on sale however.
